status (PID, uptime, RSS, activity)\n337\t    Status {\n338\t        /// JSON output\n339\t        #[arg(long)]\n340\t        json: bool,\n341\t    },\n342\t    /// Tail the daemon log\n343\t    Logs {\n344\t        /// Follow mode (like tail -f)\n345\t        #[arg(short = 'f', long)]\n346\t        follow: bool,\n347\t\n348\t        /// Number of lines to show (default: 20)\n349\t        #[arg(short = 'n', long, default_value = \"20\")]\n350\t        lines: usize,\n351\t    },\n352\t    /// Install systemd user service unit (~/.config/systemd/user/agentscribe.service)\n353\t    Install,\n354\t    /// Remove systemd user service unit\n355\t    Uninstall,\n356\t}\n357\t\n358\t/// Table row for plugin list output\n359\t#[derive(Tabled)]\n360\tstruct PluginRow {\n361\t    name: String,\n362\t    version: String,\n363\t    format: String,\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\t/// Run the CLI\n367\tpub fn run() -> Result<()> {\n368\t    let args = Args::parse();\n369\t\n370\t    match args.command {\n371\t        Commands::Config { action } => run_config(action),\n372\t        Commands::Plugins { action } => run_plugins(action),\n373\t        Commands::Scrape {\n374\t            plugin,\n375\t            file,\n376\t            dry_run,\n377\t            output_events,\n378\t            json,\n379\t        } => run_scrape(plugin, file, dry_run, output_events, json),\n380\t        Commands::Status { json, plugin } => run_status(json, plugin),\n381\t        Commands::Index { action } => run_index(action)?,\n382\t        Commands::Search {\n383\t            query,\n384\t            error,\n385\t            code,\n386\t            lang,\n387\t            solution_only,\n388\t            like,\n389\t            session,\n390\t            agent,\n391\t            project,\n392\t            since,\n393\t            before,\n394\t            tag,\n395\t            outcome,\n396\t            r#type,\n397\t            model,\n398\t            fuzzy,\n399\t            edit_distance,\n400\t            max_results,\n401\t            snippet_length,\n402\t            token_budget,\n403\t            offset,\n404\t            sort,\n405\t            hint,\n406\t            json,\n407\t        } => run_search(\n408\t            query, error, code, lang, solution_only, like, session,\n409\t            agent, project, since, before, tag, outcome, r#type, model,\n410\t            fuzzy, edit_distance, max_results, snippet_length, token_budget, offset, sort, hint, json,\n411\t        ),\n412\t        Commands::Recurring { since, threshold, json } => run_recurring(since, threshold, json),\n413\t        Commands::Daemon { action } => run_daemon(action),\n414\t        Commands::Rules { project_path, format, json } => run_rules(project_path, format, json),\n415\t        Commands::Analytics { agent, project, since, json } => run_analytics(agent, project, since, json),\n416\t        Commands::Gc { older_than, dry_run, json } => run_gc(older_than, dry_run, json),\n417\t        Commands::ShellHook { shell } => run_shell_hook(&shell),\n418\t        Commands::Digest { since, output, json } => run_digest(since, output, json),\n419\t        Commands::Completions { shell } => {\n420\t            let mut cmd = Args::command();\n421\t            generate(shell, &mut cmd, \"agentscribe\", &mut io::stdout());\n422\t            Ok(())\n423\t        }\n424\t    }\n425\t}\n426\t\n427\t/// Run daemon commands\n428\tfn run_daemon(action: DaemonAction) -> Result<()> {\n429\t    // install/uninstall don't need the data directory to exist\n430\t    match action {\n431\t        DaemonAction::Install => return crate::daemon::install_service(),\n432\t        DaemonAction::Uninstall => return crate::daemon::uninstall_service(),\n433\t        _ => {}\n434\t    }\n435\t\n436\t    let config = load_config()?;\n437\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n438\t\n439\t    // Ensure data directory exists for all other daemon commands\n440\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n441\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n442\t        std::process::exit(1);\n443\t    }\n444\t\n445\t    match action {\n446\t        DaemonAction::Start => {\n447\t            crate::daemon::start(&data_dir)?;\n448\t            Ok(())\n449\t        }\n450\t        DaemonAction::Run => {\n451\t            crate::daemon::run(&data_dir)\n452\t        }\n453\t        DaemonAction::Stop => {\n454\t            crate::daemon::stop(&data_dir)\n455\t        }\n456\t        DaemonAction::Status { json } => {\n457\t            let info = crate::daemon::status(&data_dir)?;\n458\t            if json {\n459\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&info).unwrap());\n460\t            } else {\n461\t                print_daemon_status(&info);\n462\t            }\n463\t            Ok(())\n464\t        }\n465\t        DaemonAction::Logs { follow, lines } => {\n466\t            crate::daemon::logs(&data_dir, follow, lines)\n467\t        }\n468\t        // Already handled above\n469\t        DaemonAction::Install | DaemonAction::Uninstall => unreachable!(),\n470\t    }\n471\t}\n472\t\n473\t/// Format daemon status for human-readable output\n474\tfn print_daemon_status(info: &crate::daemon::DaemonInfo) {\n475\t    if !info.running {\n476\t        println!(\"Daemon: stopped\");\n477\t        return;\n478\t    }\n479\t\n480\t    println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n481\t\n482\t    if let Some(pid) = info.pid {\n483\t        println!(\"  PID: {}\", pid);\n484\t    }\n485\t\n486\t    if let Some(secs) = info.uptime_secs {\n487\t        println!(\"  Uptime: {}\", crate::daemon::format_duration(secs));\n488\t    }\n489\t\n490\t    if let Some(rss) = info.rss_bytes {\n491\t        println!(\"  RSS: {}\", crate::daemon::format_bytes(rss));\n492\t    }\n493\t\n494\t    if let Some(peak) = info.peak_rss_bytes {\n495\t        println!(\"  Peak RSS: {}\", crate::daemon::format_bytes(peak));\n496\t    }\n497\t\n498\t    if let Some(sessions) = info.sessions_indexed {\n499\t        println!(\"  Sessions indexed: {}\", sessions);\n500\t    }\n501\t\n502\t    if let Some(ts) = info.last_scrape {\n503\t        println!(\"  Last scrape: {}\", ts.to_rfc3339());\n504\t    }\n505\t\n506\t    if let Some(ts) = info.started_at {\n507\t        println!(\"  Started at: {}\", ts.to_rfc3339());\n508\t    }\n509\t}\n510\t\n511\t/// Run config commands\n512\tfn run_config(action: ConfigAction) -> Result<()> {\n513\t    match action {\n514\t        ConfigAction::Init { force } => {\n515\t            let data_dir = config::init(force)?;\n516\t            println!(\"Initialized AgentScribe data directory: {}\", data_dir.display());\n517\t            Ok(())\n518\t        }\n519\t        ConfigAction::Show => {\n520\t            let config = load_config()?;\n521\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n522\t            println!(\"Data directory: {}\", data_dir.display());\n523\t            println!(\"Log level: {}\", config.general.log_level);\n524\t            println!(\"\\nScraping:\");\n525\t            println!(\"  Debounce: {}s\", config.scrape.debounce_seconds);\n526\t            println!(\"  Max session age: {} days\", config.scrape.max_session_age_days);\n527\t            println!(\"  Git auto-commit: {}\", config.scrape.git_auto_commit);\n528\t            println!(\"\\nSearch:\");\n529\t            println!(\"  Default max results: {}\", config.search.default_max_results);\n530\t            println!(\"  Default snippet length: {}\", config.search.default_snippet_length);\n531\t            Ok(())\n532\t        }\n533\t        ConfigAction::Set { key, value } => {\n534\t            let mut config = load_config()?;\n535\t            // Simple key-path setter (could be enhanced)\n536\t            match key.split('.').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {\n537\t                [\"general\", \"log_level\"] => config.general.log_level = value.clone(),\n538\t                [\"scrape\", \"debounce_seconds\"] => {\n539\t                    config.scrape.debounce_seconds = value.parse().unwrap_or(5);\n540\t                }\n541\t                [\"scrape\", \"max_session_age_days\"] => {\n542\t                    config.scrape.max_session_age_days = value.parse().unwrap_or(0);\n543\t                }\n544\t                [\"scrape\", \"git_auto_commit\"] => {\n545\t                    config.scrape.git_auto_commit = matches!(value.to_lowercase().as_str(), \"true\" | \"1\" | \"yes\");\n546\t                }\n547\t                _ => {\n548\t                    eprintln!(\"Unknown configuration key: {}\", key);\n549\t                    return Ok(());\n550\t                }\n551\t            }\n552\t\n553\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n554\t            let config_path = data_dir.join(\"config.toml\");\n555\t            config.save(&config_path)?;\n556\t            println!(\"Set {} = {}\", key, value);\n557\t            Ok(())\n558\t        }\n559\t        ConfigAction::Get { key } => {\n560\t            let config = load_config()?;\n561\t            let value = match key.split('.').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {\n562\t                [\"general\", \"data_dir\"] => config.data_dir()?.display().to_string(),\n563\t                [\"general\", \"log_level\"] => config.general.log_level.clone(),\n564\t                [\"scrape\", \"debounce_seconds\"] => config.scrape.debounce_seconds.to_string(),\n565\t                [\"scrape\", \"max_session_age_days\"] => config.scrape.max_session_age_days.to_string(),\n566\t                [\"scrape\", \"git_auto_commit\"] => config.scrape.git_auto_commit.to_string(),\n567\t                _ => {\n568\t                    eprintln!(\"Unknown configuration key: {}\", key);\n569\t                    return Ok(());\n570\t                }\n571\t            };\n572\t            println!(\"{}\", value);\n573\t            Ok(())\n574\t        }\n575\t    }\n576\t}\n577\t\n578\t/// Run plugins commands\n579\tfn run_plugins(action: PluginsAction) -> Result<()> {\n580\t    match action {\n581\t        PluginsAction::List { verbose } => {\n582\t            let config = load_config()?;\n583\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n584\t            let plugin_dir = data_dir.join(\"plugins\");\n585\t\n586\t            let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir)?;\n587\t            scraper.load_plugins()?;\n588\t\n589\t            let mut rows = Vec::new();\n590\t\n591\t            for (name, plugin) in scraper.plugin_manager().all() {\n592\t                rows.push(PluginRow {\n593\t                    name: name.clone(),\n594\t                    version: plugin.plugin.version.clone(),\n595\t                    format: plugin.source.format.as_str().to_string(),\n596\t                });\n597\t\n598\t                if verbose {\n599\t                    println!(\"Plugin: {}\", name);\n600\t                    println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n601\t                    println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n602\t                    println!(\"  Paths:\");\n603\t                    for path in &plugin.source.paths {\n604\t                        println!(\"    - {}\", path);\n605\t                    }\n606\t                    println!();\n607\t                }\n608\t            }\n609\t\n610\t            if !verbose {\n611\t                if rows.is_empty() {\n612\t                    println!(\"No plugins found in {}\", plugin_dir.display());\n613\t                } else {\n614\t                    println!(\"{}\", Table::new(rows));\n615\t                }\n616\t            }\n617\t\n618\t            Ok(())\n619\t        }\n620\t        PluginsAction::Validate { path } => {\n621\t            let plugin = validate_plugin_file(&path)?;\n622\t            println!(\"Plugin '{}' is valid!\", plugin.plugin.name);\n623\t            println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n624\t            println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n625\t            Ok(())\n626\t        }\n627\t        PluginsAction::Show { name } => {\n628\t            let config = load_config()?;\n629\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n630\t            let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir)?;\n631\t            scraper.load_plugins()?;\n632\t\n633\t            if let Some(plugin) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&name) {\n634\t                println!(\"Plugin: {}\", plugin.plugin.name);\n635\t                println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n636\t                println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n637\t                println!(\"\\n  Source paths:\");\n638\t                for path in &plugin.source.paths {\n639\t                    println!(\"    - {}\", path);\n640\t                }\n641\t                if !plugin.source.exclude.is_empty() {\n642\t                    println!(\"  Excludes:\");\n643\t                    for pattern in &plugin.source.exclude {\n644\t                        println!(\"    - {}\", pattern);\n645\t                    }\n646\t                }\n647\t                println!(\"\\n  Session detection:\");\n648\t                match &plugin.source.session_detection {\n649\t                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::OneFilePerSession { .. } => {\n650\t                        println!(\"    Method: one-file-per-session\");\n651\t                    }\n652\t                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::TimestampGap { gap_threshold } => {\n653\t                        println!(\"    Method: timestamp-gap ({})\", gap_threshold);\n654\t                    }\n655\t                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::Delimiter { delimiter_pattern } => {\n656\t                        println!(\"    Method: delimiter ({})\", delimiter_pattern);\n657\t                    }\n658\t                }\n659\t            } else {\n660\t                eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", name);\n661\t                std::process::exit(1);\n662\t            }\n663\t\n664\t            Ok(())\n665\t        }\n666\t    }\n667\t}\n668\t\n669\t/// Run scrape command\n670\tfn run_scrape(\n671\t    plugin: Option<String>,\n672\t    file: Option<PathBuf>,\n673\t    dry_run: bool,\n674\t    _output_events: bool,\n675\t    _json: bool,\n676\t) -> Result<()> {\n677\t    let config = load_config()?;\n678\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n679\t\n680\t    // Initialize if needed\n681\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n682\t        println!(\"Data directory not found. Initializing...\");\n683\t        config::init(false)?;\n684\t    }\n685\t\n686\t    let mut scraper = Scraper::new_with_lock_timeout(data_dir.clone(), config.scrape.lock_timeout_seconds)?;\n687\t    scraper.load_plugins()?;\n688\t\n689\t    if let Some(file_path) = file {\n690\t        // Scrape single file\n691\t        println!(\"Scraping file: {}\", file_path.display());\n692\t\n693\t        // Determine plugin from file or use specified\n694\t        let plugin_name = plugin.clone().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n695\t            // Try to detect from file location\n696\t            let path_str = file_path.display().to_string();\n697\t            if path_str.contains(\".claude\") {\n698\t                \"claude-code\".to_string()\n699\t            } else if path_str.contains(\"aider\") {\n700\t                \"aider\".to_string()\n701\t            } else if path_str.contains(\"codex\") {\n702\t                \"codex\".to_string()\n703\t            } else if path_str.contains(\"opencode\") {\n704\t                \"opencode\".to_string()\n705\t            } else {\n706\t                eprintln!(\"Cannot auto-detect plugin. Use --plugin to specify.\");\n707\t                std::process::exit(1);\n708\t            }\n709\t        });\n710\t\n711\t        if let Some(p) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&plugin_name).cloned() {\n712\t            if dry_run {\n713\t                println!(\"Dry run - would scrape with plugin: {}\", plugin_name);\n714\t                println!(\"  File: {}\", file_path.display());\n715\t                println!(\"  Format: {}\", p.source.format.as_str());\n716\t                // For dry run, just show we'd process it\n717\t                println!(\"  Would detect sessions and parse events...\");\n718\t            } else {\n719\t                let result = scraper.scrape_file(&file_path, &p)?;\n720\t                scraper.state_manager().save()?;\n721\t                println!(\"Scraped {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n722\t                if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n723\t                    println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n724\t                }\n725\t                if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n726\t                    eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n727\t                }\n728\t                if config.scrape.git_auto_commit {\n729\t                    if git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n730\t                        println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n731\t                    }\n732\t                }\n733\t            }\n734\t        } else {\n735\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", plugin_name);\n736\t            std::process::exit(1);\n737\t        }\n738\t    } else if let Some(plugin_name) = plugin {\n739\t        // Scrape specific plugin\n740\t        println!(\"Scraping plugin: {}\", plugin_name);\n741\t\n742\t        if let Some(p) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&plugin_name).cloned() {\n743\t            if dry_run {\n744\t                println!(\"Dry run - would discover and scrape files:\");\n745\t                let files = scraper.discover_files(&p)?;\n746\t                for file in files {\n747\t                    println!(\"  - {}\", file.display());\n748\t                }\n749\t            } else {\n750\t                let result = scraper.scrape_plugin(&p)?;\n751\t                scraper.state_manager().save()?;\n752\t                println!(\n753\t                    \"Scraped {} session(s) from {} file(s)\",\n754\t                    result.sessions_scraped,\n755\t                    result.files_processed\n756\t                );\n757\t                if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n758\t                    println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n759\t                }\n760\t                if result.files_skipped > 0 {\n761\t                    println!(\"  ({} files unchanged, skipped)\", result.files_skipped);\n762\t                }\n763\t                if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n764\t                    eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n765\t                    for error in &result.errors[..result.errors.len().min(5)] {\n766\t                        eprintln!(\"  - {}: {}\", error.file, error.message);\n767\t                    }\n768\t                    if result.errors.len() > 5 {\n769\t                        eprintln!(\"  ... and {} more\", result.errors.len() - 5);\n770\t                    }\n771\t                }\n772\t                if config.scrape.git_auto_commit {\n773\t                    if git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n774\t                        println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n775\t                    }\n776\t                }\n777\t            }\n778\t        } else {\n779\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", plugin_name);\n780\t            std::process::exit(1);\n781\t        }\n782\t    } else {\n783\t        // Scrape all plugins\n784\t        println!(\"Scraping all plugins...\");\n785\t\n786\t        if dry_run {\n787\t            for plugin_name in scraper.plugin_manager().names() {\n788\t                println!(\"  - {}\", plugin_name);\n789\t            }\n790\t        } else {\n791\t            let result = scraper.scrape_all()?;\n792\t            println!(\n793\t                \"Scraped {} session(s) total\",\n794\t                result.sessions_scraped\n795\t            );\n796\t            if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n797\t                println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n798\t            }\n799\t            if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n800\t                eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n801\t            }\n802\t            if config.scrape.git_auto_commit {\n803\t                if git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n804\t                    println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s) ({})\", result.sessions_scraped, result.agent_types.join(\", \"));\n805\t                }\n806\t            }\n807\t        }\n808\t    }\n809\t\n810\t    Ok(())\n811\t}\n812\t\n813\t/// Run search command\n814\t#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]\n815\tfn run_search(\n816\t    query: Option<String>,\n817\t    error: Option<String>,\n818\t    code: Option<String>,\n819\t    lang: Option<String>,\n820\t    solution_only: bool,\n821\t    like: Option<String>,\n822\t    session: Option<String>,\n823\t    agent: Vec<String>,\n824\t    project: Option<String>,\n825\t    since: Option<String>,\n826\t    before: Option<String>,\n827\t    tag: Vec<String>,\n828\t    outcome: Option<String>,\n829\t    doc_type_filter: Option<String>,\n830\t    model: Option<String>,\n831\t    fuzzy: bool,\n832\t    edit_distance: Option<u8>,\n833\t    max_results: usize,\n834\t    snippet_length: usize,\n835\t    token_budget: Option<usize>,\n836\t    offset: usize,\n837\t    sort: String,\n838\t    hint: bool,\n839\t    json: bool,\n840\t) -> Result<()> {\n841\t    let config = load_config()?;\n842\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n843\t\n844\t    let sort_order = match sort.as_str() {\n845\t        \"newest\" => SortOrder::Newest,\n846\t        \"oldest\" => SortOrder::Oldest,\n847\t        \"turns\" => SortOrder::Turns,\n848\t        _ => SortOrder::Relevance,\n849\t    };\n850\t\n851\t    let since_dt = since\n852\t        .as_deref()\n853\t        .map(search::parse_datetime)\n854\t        .transpose()?;\n855\t\n856\t    let before_dt = before\n857\t        .as_deref()\n858\t        .map(search::parse_datetime)\n859\t        .transpose()?;\n860\t\n861\t    let opts = SearchOptions {\n862\t        query,\n863\t        error_pattern: error,\n864\t        code_query: code,\n865\t        code_lang: lang,\n866\t        solution_only,\n867\t        like_session: like,\n868\t        session_id: session,\n869\t        agent,\n870\t        project,\n871\t        since: since_dt,\n872\t        before: before_dt,\n873\t        tag,\n874\t        outcome,\n875\t        doc_type_filter,\n876\t        model,\n877\t        file_path: None,\n878\t        fuzzy,\n879\t        fuzzy_distance: edit_distance.unwrap_or(config.search.fuzzy_edit_distance),\n880\t        max_results,\n881\t        snippet_length,\n882\t        token_budget,\n883\t        offset,\n884\t        sort: sort_order,\n885\t    };\n886\t\n887\t    let output = search::execute_search(&data_dir, &opts)?;\n888\t\n889\t    if hint {\n890\t        // Print a single-line hint for shell hook integration\n891\t        if let Some(result) = output.results.first() {\n892\t            let text = result\n893\t                .snippet\n894\t                .as_deref()\n895\t                .or(result.summary.as_deref())\n896\t                .unwrap_or(\"\")\n897\t                .trim();\n898\t            let one_line: String = text.split_whitespace().collect::<Vec<_>>().join(\" \");\n899\t            if !one_line.is_empty() {\n900\t                if one_line.len() > 120 {\n901\t                    println!(\"{}...\", &one_line[..117]);\n902\t                } else {\n903\t                    println!(\"{}\", one_line);\n904\t                }\n905\t            }\n906\t        }\n907\t    } else if json {\n908\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n909\t    } else {\n910\t        println!(\"{}\", search::format_human(&output, snippet_length));\n911\t    }\n912\t\n913\t    Ok(())\n914\t}\n915\t\n916\t/// Run shell-hook command\n917\tfn run_shell_hook(shell: &str) -> Result<()> {\n918\t    let config = load_config().unwrap_or_default();\n919\t    let snippet = crate::shell_hook::generate_hook(shell, &config.shell_hook)?;\n920\t    print!(\"{}\", snippet);\n921\t    Ok(())\n922\t}\n923\t\n924\t/// Run index subcommands\n925\tfn run_index(action: IndexAction) -> Result<()> {\n926\t    let config = load_config()?;\n927\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n928\t\n929\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n930\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n931\t        std::process::exit(1);\n932\t    }\n933\t\n934\t    match action {\n935\t        IndexAction::Rebuild { plugin, heap_size } => {\n936\t            run_index_rebuild(&data_dir, plugin.as_deref(), heap_size)\n937\t        }\n938\t        IndexAction::Stats => run_index_stats(&data_dir),\n939\t        IndexAction::Optimize => run_index_optimize(&data_dir),\n940\t    }\n941\t}\n942\t\n943\t/// Run index rebuild: drop existing index and rebuild from session files.\n944\tfn run_index_rebuild(data_dir: &std::path::Path, plugin_filter: Option<&str>, _heap_size: usize) -> Result<()> {\n945\t    let sessions_dir = data_dir.join(\"sessions\");\n946\t\n947\t    if !sessions_dir.exists() {\n948\t        eprintln!(\"No sessions directory found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n949\t        std::process::exit(2);\n950\t    }\n951\t\n952\t    // Drop existing index\n953\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n954\t    if index_path.exists() {\n955\t        println!(\"Dropping existing index...\");\n956\t        std::fs::remove_dir_all(&index_path)?;\n957\t    }\n958\t\n959\t    let mut manager = IndexManager::open(data_dir)?;\n960\t    manager.begin_write()?;\n961\t\n962\t    let mut total_docs = 0usize;\n963\t    let mut total_errors = 0usize;\n964\t\n965\t    // Walk session directories\n966\t    let entries = match std::fs::read_dir(&sessions_dir) {\n967\t        Ok(e) => e,\n968\t        Err(_) => {\n969\t            eprintln!(\"Cannot read sessions directory.\");\n970\t            std::process::exit(2);\n971\t        }\n972\t    };\n973\t\n974\t    for agent_entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n975\t        let agent_path = agent_entry.path();\n976\t        if !agent_path.is_dir() {\n977\t            continue;\n978\t        }\n979\t\n980\t        let agent_name = match agent_path.file_name().and_then(|n| n.to_str()) {\n981\t            Some(n) => n.to_string(),\n982\t            None => continue,\n983\t        };\n984\t\n985\t        // Apply plugin filter\n986\t        if let Some(filter) = plugin_filter {\n987\t            if agent_name != filter {\n988\t                continue;\n989\t            }\n990\t        }\n991\t\n992\t        let session_files = match std::fs::read_dir(&agent_path) {\n993\t            Ok(e) => e,\n994\t            Err(_) => continue,\n995\t        };\n996\t\n997\t        for session_entry in session_files.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n998\t            let session_path = session_entry.path();\n999\t            if session_path.extension().and_then(|e| e.to_str()) != Some(\"jsonl\") {\n1000\t                continue;\n1001\t            }\n1002\t\n1003\t            let session_id = format!(\"{}/{}\", agent_name,\n1004\t                session_path.file_stem().and_then(|s| s.to_str()).unwrap_or(\"unknown\"));\n1005\t\n1006\t            // Read events from the normalized session file\n1007\t            let file = match std::fs::File::open(&session_path) {\n1008\t                Ok(f) => f,\n1009\t                Err(e) => {\n1010\t                    eprintln!(\"Error reading {}: {}\", session_path.display(), e);\n1011\t                    total_errors += 1;\n1012\t                    continue;\n1013\t                }\n1014\t            };\n1015\t\n1016\t            use std::io::BufRead;\n1017\t            let reader = std::io::BufReader::new(file);\n1018\t            let mut events = Vec::new();\n1019\t\n1020\t            for line in reader.lines() {\n1021\t                match line {\n1022\t                    Ok(l) => {\n1023\t                        if let Ok(event) = crate::event::Event::from_jsonl(&l) {\n1024\t                            events.push(event);\n1025\t                        }\n1026\t                    }\n1027\t                    Err(_) => {\n1028\t                        total_errors += 1;\n1029\t                        continue;\n1030\t                    }\n1031\t                }\n1032\t            }\n1033\t\n1034\t            if events.is_empty() {\n1035\t                continue;\n1036\t            }\n1037\t\n1038\t            // Build manifest from events\n1039\t            let first = &events[0];\n1040\t            let manifest = crate::index::build_manifest_from_events(\n1041\t                &events,\n1042\t                &session_id,\n1043\t                &agent_name,\n1044\t                first.project.as_deref(),\n1045\t                first.model.as_deref(),\n1046\t            );\n1047\t\n1048\t            match manager.index_session(&events, &manifest) {\n1049\t                Ok(_) => total_docs += 1,\n1050\t                Err(e) => {\n1051\t                    eprintln!(\"Error indexing {}: {}\", session_id, e);\n1052\t                    total_errors += 1;\n1053\t                }\n1054\t            }\n1055\t        }\n1056\t    }\n1057\t\n1058\t    manager.finish()?;\n1059\t\n1060\t    println!(\"Rebuilt index from {} session files ({} errors)\", total_docs, total_errors);\n1061\t    Ok(())\n1062\t}\n1063\t\n1064\t/// Show index statistics.\n1065\tfn run_index_stats(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n1066\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1067\t\n1068\t    if !index_path.exists() {\n1069\t        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1070\t        return Ok(());\n1071\t    }\n1072\t\n1073\t    let index = match search::open_index(data_dir) {\n1074\t        Ok(i) => i,\n1075\t        Err(e) => {\n1076\t            eprintln!(\"Error opening index: {}\", e);\n1077\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1078\t        }\n1079\t    };\n1080\t\n1081\t    let reader = index.reader().map_err(|e| {\n1082\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to create reader: {}\", e))\n1083\t    })?;\n1084\t    let searcher = reader.searcher();\n1085\t\n1086\t    let num_docs = searcher.num_docs();\n1087\t    let segments = index.searchable_segment_metas()?;\n1088\t    let num_segments = segments.len();\n1089\t    let schema = index.schema();\n1090\t    let fields: Vec<String> = schema.fields().map(|(field, _)| {\n1091\t        schema.get_field_name(field).to_string()\n1092\t    }).collect();\n1093\t\n1094\t    let size_bytes = dir_size(&index_path);\n1095\t\n1096\t    println!(\"Tantivy index at {}\", index_path.display());\n1097\t    println!(\"  Documents:    {}\", num_docs);\n1098\t    println!(\"  Segments:     {}\", num_segments);\n1099\t    println!(\"  Size on disk: {}\", format_bytes(size_bytes));\n1100\t    println!(\"  Fields:       {}\", fields.join(\", \"));\n1101\t\n1102\t    Ok(())\n1103\t}\n1104\t\n1105\t/// Optimize the index by merging segments.\n1106\tfn run_index_optimize(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n1107\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1108\t\n1109\t    if !index_path.exists() {\n1110\t        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1111\t        return Ok(());\n1112\t    }\n1113\t\n1114\t    let pre_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n1115\t\n1116\t    let index = search::open_index(data_dir)?;\n1117\t    let segments = index.searchable_segment_metas()?;\n1118\t    let num_segments = segments.len();\n1119\t\n1120\t    println!(\"Merging {} segments...\", num_segments);\n1121\t\n1122\t    let writer = index.writer(50_000_000).map_err(|e| {\n1123\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to open writer: {}\", e))\n1124\t    })?;\n1125\t\n1126\t    // Block until merge completes\n1127\t    let merge_future = writer.merge_segments();\n1128\t    merge_future.wait().map_err(|e| {\n1129\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to merge segments: {}\", e))\n1130\t    })?;\n1131\t\n1132\t    // Trigger GC to clean old segment files\n1133\t    drop(writer);\n1134\t    let gc_writer = index.writer(50_000_000).map_err(|e| {\n1135\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to open writer for GC: {}\", e))\n1136\t    })?;\n1137\t    gc_writer.garbage_collect_files().wait().map_err(|e| {\n1138\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to garbage collect: {}\", e))\n1139\t    })?;\n1140\t\n1141\t    let post_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n1142\t\n1143\t    println!(\"Merged {} segments ({} → {})\", num_segments, format_bytes(pre_size), format_bytes(post_size));\n1144\t\n1145\t    Ok(())\n1146\t}\n1147\t\n1148\t/// Run status command\n1149\tfn run_status(json: bool, plugin_filter: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n1150\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1151\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1152\t    let data_dir_str = data_dir.display().to_string();\n1153\t\n1154\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1155\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1156\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1157\t    }\n1158\t\n1159\t    let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir.clone())?;\n1160\t    scraper.load_plugins()?;\n1161\t\n1162\t    // Determine which plugins to show\n1163\t    let plugin_names: Vec<String> = if let Some(ref filter) = plugin_filter {\n1164\t        if scraper.plugin_manager().get(filter).is_some() {\n1165\t            vec![filter.clone()]\n1166\t        } else {\n1167\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", filter);\n1168\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1169\t        }\n1170\t    } else {\n1171\t        scraper.plugin_manager().names()\n1172\t            .into_iter()\n1173\t            .map(String::from)\n1174\t            .collect()\n1175\t    };\n1176\t\n1177\t    // Gather scrape state\n1178\t    let scrape_state = scraper.state_manager().get_all();\n1179\t\n1180\t    // Collect per-plugin status\n1181\t    let mut plugin_statuses = Vec::new();\n1182\t    let mut total_events: u64 = 0;\n1183\t    let mut total_sources: usize = 0;\n1184\t    let mut total_bytes: u64 = 0;\n1185\t\n1186\t    for plugin_name in &plugin_names {\n1187\t        let sessions = scraper.list_sessions(plugin_name)?;\n1188\t\n1189\t        // Count events across all sessions for this plugin\n1190\t        let mut plugin_events: u64 = 0;\n1191\t        for session_id in &sessions {\n1192\t            if let Ok(events) = scraper.read_session(session_id) {\n1193\t                plugin_events += events.len() as u64;\n1194\t            }\n1195\t        }\n1196\t        total_events += plugin_events;\n1197\t\n1198\t        // Get source paths and truncation_limit from plugin config\n1199\t        let (source_paths, truncation_limit) = scraper.plugin_manager()\n1200\t            .get(plugin_name)\n1201\t            .map(|p| (p.source.paths.clone(), p.source.truncation_limit))\n1202\t            .unwrap_or_default();\n1203\t\n1204\t        // Find last scraped time and byte totals from scrape state for this plugin\n1205\t        let plugin_files: Vec<_> = scrape_state.sources.iter()\n1206\t            .filter(|(_, s)| s.plugin == *plugin_name)\n1207\t            .collect();\n1208\t\n1209\t        let last_scraped = plugin_files.iter()\n1210\t            .filter_map(|(_, s)| Some(s.last_scraped))\n1211\t            .max();\n1212\t\n1213\t        let mut plugin_bytes: u64 = 0;\n1214\t        for (_, file_state) in &plugin_files {\n1215\t            plugin_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n1216\t            total_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n1217\t        }\n1218\t        total_sources += plugin_files.len();\n1219\t\n1220\t        plugin_statuses.push(PluginStatus {\n1221\t            name: plugin_name.to_string(),\n1222\t            sessions: sessions.len(),\n1223\t            events: plugin_events,\n1224\t            last_scraped,\n1225\t            source_paths,\n1226\t            source_files: plugin_files.len(),\n1227\t            bytes: plugin_bytes,\n1228\t            truncation_limit,\n1229\t        });\n1230\t    }\n1231\t\n1232\t    // Daemon state (Phase 4 - check PID file if it exists)\n1233\t    let daemon_status = get_daemon_status(&data_dir);\n1234\t\n1235\t    // Disk usage of data directory\n1236\t    let dir_bytes = dir_size(&data_dir);\n1237\t\n1238\t    // Index stats (Phase 2 - check if index directory exists)\n1239\t    let index_dir = data_dir.join(\"index\");\n1240\t    let index_stats = get_index_stats(&index_dir);\n1241\t\n1242\t    if json {\n1243\t        use serde_json::json;\n1244\t        let mut plugins_json = Vec::new();\n1245\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1246\t            let mut p = json!({\n1247\t                \"name\": ps.name,\n1248\t                \"sessions\": ps.sessions,\n1249\t                \"events\": ps.events,\n1250\t                \"source_files\": ps.source_files,\n1251\t                \"bytes\": ps.bytes,\n1252\t                \"source_paths\": ps.source_paths,\n1253\t            });\n1254\t            if let Some(ts) = ps.last_scraped {\n1255\t                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(ts.to_rfc3339());\n1256\t            } else {\n1257\t                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(null);\n1258\t            }\n1259\t            plugins_json.push(p);\n1260\t        }\n1261\t\n1262\t        let mut status = json!({\n1263\t            \"version\": env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"),\n1264\t            \"data_dir\": data_dir_str,\n1265\t            \"data_dir_bytes\": dir_bytes,\n1266\t            \"plugins\": plugins_json,\n1267\t            \"scrape_state\": {\n1268\t                \"tracked_sources\": total_sources,\n1269\t                \"total_bytes\": total_bytes,\n1270\t            },\n1271\t            \"daemon\": {\n1272\t                \"running\": daemon_status.running,\n1273\t                \"pid\": daemon_status.pid,\n1274\t            },\n1275\t            \"index\": {\n1276\t                \"exists\":        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&status).unwrap());\n1283\t    } else {\n1284\t        println!(\"AgentScribe v{}\", env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"));\n1285\t        println!(\"Data dir: {} ({})\", data_dir_str, format_bytes(dir_bytes));\n1286\t\n1287\t        // Daemon\n1288\t        if daemon_status.running {\n1289\t            if let Some(pid) = daemon_status.pid {\n1290\t                println!(\"Daemon: running (PID {})\", pid);\n1291\t            } else {\n1292\t                println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n1293\t            }\n1294\t        } else {\n1295\t            println!(\"Daemon: stopped\");\n1296\t        }\n1297\t\n1298\t        // Plugins\n1299\t        println!(\"\\nPlugins:\");\n1300\t        if plugin_statuses.is_empty() {\n1301\t            println!(\"  (none)\");\n1302\t        }\n1303\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1304\t            let last = match ps.last_scraped {\n1305\t                Some(ts) => format_ago(ts),\n1306\t                None => \"never scraped\".to_string(),\n1307\t            };\n1308\t            println!(\n1309\t                \"  {:<14} {:>4} sessions  {:>6} events  {}  ({} source files, {})\",\n1310\t                ps.name, ps.sessions, ps.events, last, ps.source_files, format_bytes(ps.bytes)\n1311\t            );\n1312\t        }\n1313\t\n1314\t        // Windsurf truncation warning\n1315\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1316\t            if ps.name == \"windsurf\" && ps.truncation_limit.is_some() {\n1317\t                println!(\"\\n  WARNING: Windsurf retains at most {} conversations.\",\n1318\t                         ps.truncation_limit.unwrap());\n1319\t                println!(\"  Old conversations are silently overwritten. Run 'agentscribe scrape'\");\n1320\t                println!(\"  frequently (e.g., via 'agentscribe daemon start') to avoid data loss.\");\n1321\t                break;\n1322\t            }\n1323\t        }\n1324\t\n1325\t        // Index\n1326\t        if index_stats.exists {\n1327\t            println!(\n1328\t                \"\\nIndex: {} documents, {} on disk\",\n1329\t                index_stats.documents,\n1330\t                format_bytes(index_stats.size_bytes)\n1331\t            );\n1332\t        } else {\n1333\t            println!(\"\\nIndex: not built (run 'agentscribe index build')\");\n1334\t        }\n1335\t\n1336\t        // Scrape state\n1337\t        println!(\n1338\t            \"\\nScrape state: tracking offsets for {} source paths ({} total)\",\n1339\t            total_sources,\n1340\t            format_bytes(total_bytes)\n1341\t        );\n1342\t    }\n1343\t\n1344\t    Ok(())\n1345\t}\n1346\t\n1347\t/// Per-plugin status data\n1348\tstruct PluginStatus {\n1349\t    name: String,\n1350\t    sessions: usize,\n1351\t    events: u64,\n1352\t    last_scraped: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>,\n1353\t    source_paths: Vec<String>,\n1354\t    source_files: usize,\n1355\t    bytes: u64,\n1356\t    truncation_limit: Option<u32>,\n1357\t}\n1358\t\n1359\t/// Daemon status info\n1360\tstruct DaemonStatus {\n1361\t    running: bool,\n1362\t    pid: Option<u32>,\n1363\t}\n1364\t\n1365\t/// Index stats\n1366\tstruct IndexStats {\n1367\t    exists: bool,\n1368\t    documents: usize,\n1369\t    size_bytes: u64,\n1370\t}\n1371\t\n1372\t/// Check daemon status by reading PID file\n1373\tfn get_daemon_status(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> DaemonStatus {\n1374\t    let pid_file = data_dir.join(\"agentscribe.pid\");\n1375\t    if let Ok(content) = std::fs::read_to_string(&pid_file) {\n1376\t        if let Ok(pid) = content.trim().parse::<u32>() {\n1377\t            // Check if process is actually running\n1378\t            unsafe {\n1379\t                // kill(pid, 0) checks if process exists without sending a signal\n1380\t                if libc::kill(pid as i32, 0) == 0 {\n1381\t                    return DaemonStatus {\n1382\t                        running: true,\n1383\t                        pid: Some(pid),\n1384\t                    };\n1385\t                }\n1386\t            }\n1387\t        }\n1388\t    }\n1389\t    DaemonStatus {\n1390\t        running: false,\n1391\t        pid: None,\n1392\t    }\n1393\t}\n1394\t\n1395\t/// Get index stats\n1396\tfn get_index_stats(index_dir: &std::path::Path) -> IndexStats {\n1397\t    let tantivy_dir = index_dir.join(\"tantivy\");\n1398\t    if !tantivy_dir.exists() {\n1399\t        return IndexStats {\n1400\t            exists: false,\n1401\t            documents: 0,\n1402\t            size_bytes: 0,\n1403\t        };\n1404\t    }\n1405\t\n1406\t    let size_bytes = dir_size(&tantivy_dir);\n1407\t\n1408\t    // Read actual document count from Tantivy index\n1409\t    let documents = match tantivy::Index::open_in_dir(&tantivy_dir) {\n1410\t        Ok(index) => {\n1411\t            match index.reader() {\n1412\t                Ok(reader) => reader.searcher().num_docs() as usize,\n1413\t                Err(_) => 0,\n1414\t            }\n1415\t        }\n1416\t        Err(_) => 0,\n1417\t    };\n1418\t\n1419\t    IndexStats {\n1420\t        exists: documents > 0 || size_bytes > 0,\n1421\t        documents,\n1422\t        size_bytes,\n1423\t    }\n1424\t}\n1425\t\n1426\t/// Format bytes as human-readable size\n1427\tfn format_bytes(bytes: u64) -> String {\n1428\t    const KB: u64 = 1024;\n1429\t    const MB: u64 = 1024 * KB;\n1430\t    const GB: u64 = 1024 * MB;\n1431\t\n1432\t    if bytes >= GB {\n1433\t        format!(\"{:.1} GB\", bytes as f64 / GB as f64)\n1434\t    } else if bytes >= MB {\n1435\t        format!(\"{:.1} MB\", bytes as f64 / MB as f64)\n1436\t    } else if bytes >= KB {\n1437\t        format!(\"{:.1} KB\", bytes as f64 / KB as f64)\n1438\t    } else {\n1439\t        format!(\"{} B\", bytes)\n1440\t    }\n1441\t}\n1442\t\n1443\t/// Format a timestamp as relative time ago\n1444\tfn format_ago(ts: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>) -> String {\n1445\t    let now = chrono::Utc::now();\n1446\t    let duration = now.signed_duration_since(ts);\n1447\t\n1448\t    if duration.num_days() > 0 {\n1449\t        format!(\"{}d ago\", duration.num_days())\n1450\t    } else if duration.num_hours() > 0 {\n1451\t        format!(\"{}h ago\", duration.num_hours())\n1452\t    } else if duration.num_minutes() > 0 {\n1453\t        format!(\"{}m ago\", duration.num_minutes())\n1454\t    } else {\n1455\t        \"just now\".to_string()\n1456\t    }\n1457\t}\n1458\t\n1459\t/// Recursively compute directory size in bytes\n1460\tfn dir_size(path: &std::path::Path) -> u64 {\n1461\t    if !path.exists() {\n1462\t        return 0;\n1463\t    }\n1464\t\n1465\t    if path.is_file() {\n1466\t        return path.metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0);\n1467\t    }\n1468\t\n1469\t    let mut total: u64 = 0;\n1470\t    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n1471\t        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1472\t            let p = entry.path();\n1473\t            if p.is_dir() {\n1474\t                total += dir_size(&p);\n1475\t Pass `0` to\n68\t    /// disable the timeout (wait indefinitely).\n69\t    pub fn new_with_lock_timeout(data_dir: PathBuf, lock_timeout_secs: u64) -> Result<Self> {\n70\t        let plugin_dir = data_dir.join(\"plugins\");\n71\t        let state_file = data_dir.join(\"state\").join(\"scrape-state.json\");\n72\t        let sessions_dir = data_dir.join(\"sessions\");\n73\t\n74\t        // Create directories\n75\t        std::fs::create_dir_all(&plugin_dir)?;\n76\t        std::fs::create_dir_all(&sessions_dir)?;\n77\t        std::fs::create_dir_all(state_file.parent().unwrap())?;\n78\t\n79\t        let plugin_manager = PluginManager::new(plugin_dir);\n80\t        let lock_timeout = Duration::from_secs(lock_timeout_secs);\n81\t        let state_manager = StateManager::new_with_timeout(state_file, lock_timeout)?;\n82\t\n83\t        // Initialize index manager (best-effort — scraping continues without indexing if it fails)\n84\t        let index_manager = match IndexManager::open(&data_dir) {\n85\t            Ok(mgr) => Some(mgr),\n86\t            Err(e) => {\n87\t                eprintln!(\"Warning: Index not available: {}.        .ok_or_else(|| AgentScribeError::Timestamp(format!(\"Field '{}' not found\", path)))?;\n102\t\n103\t    // Try ISO 8601 first\n104\t    if let Ok(dt) = DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&ts_str) {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TR6qsVAkLkUbuosjYkDVR1","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# AgentScribe\n2\t\n3\tArchive, search, and learn from coding agent conversations.\n4\t\n5\tAgentScribe normalizes logs from multiple AI coding agents into a unified format, indexes them with full-text search, and extracts actionable intelligence — error patterns, solutions, anti-patterns, and auto-generated project rules.\n6\t\n7\t## Supported Agents\n8\t\n9\t| Agent | Format | Plugin |\n10\t|-------|--------|--------|\n11\t| Claude Code | JSONL | `claude-code` (bundled) |\n12\t| Aider | Markdown | `aider` (bundled) |\n13\t| OpenCode | JSON tree | `opencode` (bundled) |\n14\t| Codex | JSONL | `codex` (bundled) |\n15\t| Cursor | SQLite | user-provided |\n16\t| Windsurf | SQLite | user-provided |\n17\t\n18\tAdd new agents by writing a single TOML file — no code changes needed. See the [Plugin Authoring Guide](plugins/BUILDING_PLUGINS.md).\n19\t\n20\t## Features\n21\t\n22\t- **Multi-agent archival** — Scrape and normalize conversations from any supported agent into a canonical JSONL format\n23\t- **Incremental scraping** — Tracks file offsets; only processes new data on each run\n24\t- **Full-text search** — BM25-ranked search with fuzzy matching, faceted filters, \"more like this\", and code search\n25\t- **Intelligence pipeline** — Outcome detection, solution extraction, error fingerprinting, anti-pattern detection\n26\t- **Cross-agent analytics** — Compare success rates, specialization, cost efficiency across agents\n27\t- **Recurring problems** — Detect errors that happen repeatedly, with links to sessions that fixed them\n28\t- **Auto-generated rules** — Extract project conventions from past sessions into CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / .aider.conf.yml\n29\t- **Activity digests** — Weekly summaries of agent activity, recurring problems, and trends\n30\t- **Background daemon** — Watches for new log data and scrapes automatically\n31\t- **Plugin system** — Add support for new agents with a declarative TOML config\n32\t\n33\t## Installation\n34\t\n35\t### From source\n36\t\n37\tRequires Rust 1.75+ and a C compiler (for `libsqlite3-sys`).\n38\t\n39\t```bash\n40\tgit clone https://github.com/coding/AgentScribe.git\n41\tcd AgentScribe\n42\tcargo install --path .\n43\t```\n44\t\n45\t### Shell completions\n46\t\n47\t```bash\n48\t# Bash\n49\tagentscribe completions bash > ~/.local/share/bash-completion/completions/agentscribe\n50\t\n51\t# Zsh\n52\tagentscribe completions zsh > ~/.zfunc/_agentscribe\n53\t\n54\t# Fish\n55\tagentscribe completions fish > ~/.config/fish/completions/agentscribe.fish\n56\t```\n57\t\n58\t## Quick Start\n59\t\n60\t```bash\n61\t# 1. Initialize data directory and install bundled plugins\n62\tagentscribe config init\n63\t\n64\t# 2. Scrape all agent logs\n65\tagentscribe scrape\n66\t\n67\t# 3. Search across sessions\n68\tagentscribe search \"database connection timeout\"\n69\t\n70\t# 4. Check for recurring problems\n71\tagentscribe recurring --since 30d\n72\t\n73\t# 5. Generate analytics\n74\tagentscribe analytics --json\n75\t\n76\t# 6. Auto-generate project rules\n77\tagentscribe rules ~/my-project --format claude\n78\t```\n79\t\n80\t## Architecture\n81\t\n82\t```\n83\tAgent Logs (JSONL, Markdown, JSON-tree, SQLite)\n84\t         │\n85\t         ▼\n86\t   ┌─────────────┐\n87\t   │   Scrapers   │  Plugin-driven: each agent has a TOML config\n88\t   │  (per-agent) │  that declares paths, format, field mappings\n89\t   └──────┬───────┘\n90\t          │\n91\t          ▼\n92\t   ┌─────────────┐\n93\t   │   Parsers    │  Format-specific: JSONL, Markdown, JSON-tree, SQLite\n94\t   │ (normalize)  │  Output: canonical event schema\n95\t   └──────┬───────┘\n96\t          │\n97\t          ▼\n98\t   ┌─────────────┐\n99\t   │ Enrichment   │  Outcome detection, error fingerprinting,\n100\t   │  Pipeline    │  solution extraction, anti-patterns,\n101\t   │              │  code artifacts, git correlation\n102\t   └──────┬───────┘\n103\t          │\n104\t          ▼\n105\t   ┌─────────────┐\n106\t   │    Index     │  Tantivy full-text index (BM25)\n107\t   │              │  Faceted filters, fuzzy matching\n108\t   └──────┬───────┘\n109\t          │\n110\t          ▼\n111\t   ┌─────────────┐\n112\t   │    Search    │  Full-text, error lookup, code search,\n113\t   │              │  \"more like this\", session retrieval\n114\t   └─────────────┘\n115\t```\n116\t\n117\t### Data Directory Layout\n118\t\n119\t```\n120\t~/.agentscribe/\n121\t├── config.toml          # Global configuration\n122\t├── agentscribe.pid      # Daemon PID file\n123\t├── daemon.log           # Daemon log output\n124\t├── daemon_state.json    # Daemon runtime state\n125\t├── plugins/             # Plugin TOML files\n126\t│   ├── claude-code.toml\n127\t│   ├── aider.toml\n128\t│   ├── codex.toml\n129\t│   └── opencode.toml\n130\t├── sessions/            # Normalized session JSONL files\n131\t│   ├── claude-code/\n132\t│   ├── aider/\n133\t│   └── codex/\n134\t├── index/               # Tantivy search index\n135\t│   └── tantivy/\n136\t└── state/               # Scrape state (offset tracking)\n137\t```\n138\t\n139\t## Documentation\n140\t\n141\t- [CLI Reference](docs/cli-reference.md) — All commands, flags, and output formats\n142\t- [Configuration Reference](docs/configuration.md) — All `config.toml` options\n143\t- [Plugin Authoring Guide](plugins/BUILDING_PLUGINS.md) — How to add support for new agents\n144\t- [Example Workflows](docs/workflows.md) — Real-world usage scenarios\n145\t- [Implementation Plan](docs/plan.md) — Architecture and design decisions\n146\t\n147\t## Configuration\n148\t\n149\tAgentScribe reads configuration from `~/.agentscribe/config.toml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_DIR/agentscribe/config.toml`). See the [Configuration Reference](docs/configuration.md) for all options.\n150\t\n151\t```toml\n152\t[general]\n153\tlog_level = \"info\"\n154\t\n155\t[scrape]\n156\tdebounce_seconds = 5\n157\tmax_session_age_days = 0\n158\t\n159\t[index]\n160\ttantivy_heap_size_mb = 50\n161\t\n162\t[search]\n163\tdefault_max_results = 10\n164\tdefault_snippet_length = 200\n165\t```\n166\t\n167\t## Environment Variables\n168\t\n169\t| Variable | Description |\n170\t|----------|-------------|\n171\t| `AGENTSCRIBE_DATA_DIR` | Override data directory (default: `~/.agentscribe`) |\n172\t| `AGENTSCRIBE_CONFIG` | Override config file path |\n173\t| `AGENTSCRIBE_LOG` | Set log level: `error`, `warn`, `info`, `debug`, `trace` |\n174\t| `AGENTSCRIBE_NO_COLOR` | Disable color output |\n175\t\n176\t## License\n177\t\n178\tMIT\n179\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01JrfVke8QQtskBLywoAiXtg","session_id":"6da24c23-e50b-44a0-976f-21053d71ef35","uuid":"9d65ba98-ae96-4295-8e34-6597a1c4e778","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:39:30.835Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SsqFzeUcXdQfmmgG5k9BHo","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# AgentScribe — Implementation Plan\n2\t\n3\t## Overview\n4\t\n5\tAgentScribe is a Rust CLI binary that scrapes conversation logs from multiple coding agent types, normalizes them into a canonical format, and stores them as flat files with a Tantivy search index. It serves three purposes:\n6\t\n7\t1. **Archive** — capture and preserve the full prompt/response history from all agents running in an environment\n8\t2. **Search** — provide a query interface that agents can invoke to find past solutions, error patterns, and reference implementations\n9\t3. **Learn** — distill accumulated agent knowledge into actionable intelligence: error→solution mappings, anti-patterns, project rules, and effectiveness analytics\n10\t\n11\t---\n12\t\n13\t## Problem\n14\t\n15\tEvery coding agent stores its conversation history differently — JSONL, Markdown, JSON trees, SQLite blobs. When multiple agents operate in the same environment, there is no unified way to search across their collective knowledge. A solution one agent found last week is invisible to another agent today. Mistakes are repeated. Patterns go unnoticed. Institutional knowledge is locked inside individual agent log formats.\n16\t\n17\t---\n18\t\n19\t## Agent Log Formats (Known Sources)\n20\t\n21\t### Claude Code\n22\t- **Location:** `~/.claude/projects/<path-encoded>/<session-uuid>.jsonl`\n23\t- **Format:** JSONL, one event per line\n24\t- **Schema:** `{type, uuid, sessionId, timestamp, cwd, version, gitBranch, message: {role, content}}`\n25\t- **Types:** `user`, `assistant`, `progress`, `file-history-snapshot`\n26\t- **Sub-agents:** `<session-uuid>/subagents/agent-<id>.jsonl` (same format, `isSidechain: true`)\n27\t- **Metadata:** `~/.claude/usage-data/session-meta/<session-uuid>.json` (duration, tokens, tool counts)\n28\t- **Summaries:** `~/.claude/usage-data/facets/<session-uuid>.json` (LLM-generated goal/outcome/summary)\n29\t\n30\t### Aider\n31\t- **Location:** `.aider.chat.history.md` in project root\n32\t- **Format:** Markdown, append-only\n33\t- **Schema:** `#### ` prefix = user message, `> ` prefix = tool output, bare text = assistant response\n34\t- **Input history:** `.aider.input.history` (prompt_toolkit format: `# timestamp` + `+` prefixed lines)\n35\t- **Session marker:** `# aider chat started at YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` delimits sessions\n36\t\n37\t### OpenCode\n38\t- **Location:** `~/.local/share/opencode/storage/` (legacy JSON) or `.opencode/` (current SQLite)\n39\t- **Format:** Individual JSON files in a hierarchy (legacy) or SQLite via Drizzle ORM (current)\n40\t- **Schema:** `session/{projectId}/{sessionId}.json`, `message/{sessionId}/{messageId}.json`, `part/{messageId}/{partId}.json`\n41\t- **Fields:** role, cost, tokens, timestamps; parts contain text, tool calls, tool results\n42\t\n43\t### Codex (OpenAI)\n44\t- **Location:** `~/.codex/sessions/YYYY/MM/DD/rollout-{session_id}.jsonl` (may be `.jsonl.zst`)\n45\t- **Format:** JSONL, one event per line\n46\t- **Schema:** Line 1 is `RolloutLine::Meta` with `{thread_id, cwd, model}`, subsequent lines are `RolloutLine::Item` events\n47\t- **Note:** Internal format, subject to change; ephemeral mode writes no file\n48\t\n49\t### Cursor\n50\t- **Location:** `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb` + `workspaceStorage/{hash}/state.vscdb`\n51\t- **Format:** SQLite (`state.vscdb`), `cursorDiskKV` table\n52\t- **Schema:** `composerData:<composerId>` keys for session metadata, `bubbleId:<composerId>:<bubbleId>` keys for messages\n53\t- **Note:** Requires SQLite extraction; global DB can grow to 25GB+; schema varies across versions\n54\t\n55\t### Windsurf / Codeium\n56\t- **Location:** `~/.config/Windsurf/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb` + `workspaceStorage/{hash}/state.vscdb`\n57\t- **Format:** SQLite (`state.vscdb`), same `cursorDiskKV` table pattern as Cursor\n58\t- **Note:** Hard limit of 20 conversations (21st overwrites oldest) — scrape early or lose data\n59\t\n60\t---\n61\t\n62\t## Architecture\n63\t\n64\t### CLI Commands\n65\t\n66\t```\n67\tagentscribe <command>\n68\t├── config      # Manage global config and data directory (init|show|set|get)\n69\t├── plugins     # Manage scraper plugin definitions (list|validate|show)\n70\t├── scrape      # Discover and read agent log files from known locations\n71\t├── index       # Manage the Tantivy search index (rebuild|stats|optimize)\n72\t├── search      # Query the index — primary interface for agents\n73\t├── blame       # Bidirectional git commit ↔ session linking\n74\t├── file        # File knowledge map — show all sessions that touched a file\n75\t├── recurring   # Surface problems that keep being solved repeatedly\n76\t├── rules       # Auto-generate project rules from session patterns\n77\t├── analytics   # Agent effectiveness metrics and comparisons\n78\t├── summarize   # Generate Markdown summaries for sessions\n79\t├── digest      # Automated activity summary over a time period\n80\t├── status      # Show tracked agents, session counts, daemon state\n81\t├── daemon      # Long-running background process (start|stop|status|run|logs)\n82\t├── gc          # Delete old sessions, compact index, reclaim disk space\n83\t├── shell-hook  # Generate shell integration for search-on-error (bash|zsh|fish)\n84\t└── completions # Generate shell completions (bash|zsh|fish)\n85\t```\n86\t\n87\tSee [cli-reference.md](cli-reference.md) for detailed help on every command, flag, output format, and exit code.\n88\t\n89\t### Scraper Plugin System\n90\t\n91\tEach agent type is defined by a **scraper plugin** — a declarative TOML config that tells AgentScribe where to find logs and how to normalize them. Adding a new agent type means adding a plugin definition, not modifying code. See [../plugins/BUILDING_PLUGINS.md](../plugins/BUILDING_PLUGINS.md) for the full plugin authoring guide.\n92\t\n93\t```toml\n94\t# ~/.agentscribe/plugins/claude-code.toml\n95\t[plugin]\n96\tname = \"claude-code\"\n97\tversion = \"1.0\"\n98\t\n99\t[source]\n100\tpaths = [\"~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl\"]\n101\texclude = [\"*/subagents/*\"]\n102\tformat = \"jsonl\"\n103\t\n104\t[source.session_detection]\n105\tmethod = \"one-file-per-session\"\n106\tsession_id_from = \"filename\"\n107\t\n108\t[parser]\n109\ttimestamp = \"timestamp\"\n110\trole = \"message.role\"\n111\tcontent = \"message.content\"\n112\ttype = \"type\"\n113\t\n114\t[parser.static]\n115\tsource_agent = \"claude-code\"\n116\t\n117\t[parser.project]\n118\tmethod = \"field:cwd\"                 # Extract project path from session's cwd field\n119\t# Alternatives: \"parent_dir\" (parent of the log file), \"git_root\" (git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\n120\t\n121\t[parser.model]\n122\tsource = \"metadata\"                  # Extract model name from session_meta JSON\n123\tfield = \"model\"                      # Field path within the metadata file\n124\t# Alternatives: source = \"event\" + field = \"model\" (from event data)\n125\t#               source = \"static\" + value = \"claude-sonnet-4\" (hardcoded per plugin)\n126\t\n127\t[parser.file_paths]\n128\ttool_call_field = \"input.file_path\"  # Structured extraction from tool_call events\n129\tcontent_regex = true                 # Also extract paths from content via regex\n130\t\n131\t[metadata]\n132\tsession_meta = \"~/.claude/usage-data/session-meta/{session_id}.json\"\n133\tsession_facets = \"~/.claude/usage-data/facets/{session_id}.json\"\n134\t```\n135\t\n136\t```toml\n137\t# ~/.agentscribe/plugins/aider.toml\n138\t[plugin]\n139\tname = \"aider\"\n140\tversion = \"1.0\"\n141\t\n142\t[source]\n143\tpaths = [\"~/projects/*/.aider.chat.history.md\", \"~/repos/*/.aider.chat.history.md\"]\n144\tformat = \"markdown\"\n145\t\n146\t[source.session_detection]\n147\tmethod = \"delimiter\"\n148\tdelimiter_pattern = \"^# aider chat started at (.+)$\"\n149\t\n150\t[parser]"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01JrfVke8QQtskBLywoAiXtg","session_id":"6da24c23-e50b-44a0-976f-21053d71ef35","uuid":"ebbfa250-3dcb-4b96-a1cf-bb6ff1dcd0f2","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:39:31.184Z"}

(bundled)\ntokio 1.42             # Async runtime (for daemon)\nnotify 7.0             # File system watcher (inotify)\nchrono 0.4             # Date/time handling\nregex 1.11             # Pattern matching\nwalkdir 2.5            # Directory traversal\nconsole/termcolor      # Terminal colors\ntabled 0.17            # Table formatting for output\ntracing 0.1            # Structured logging\n```\n\n---\n\n## **Key Files & Implementation Details**\n\n### **1. main.rs (33 lines)**\n- Simple entry point that delegates to `cli::run()`\n- Imports all modules, sets up allow(clippy attributes)\n\n### **2. cli.rs (1,702 lines) — CLI Commands**\nComplete implementation of all subcommands:\n\n**Config Management:**\n- `agentscribe config init` — Initialize data directory and install plugins\n- `agentscribe config show` — Display current configuration\n- `agentscribe config set <key> <value>` — Update config value\n- `agentscribe config get <key>` — Get config value\n\n**Plugin Management:**\n- `agentscribe plugins list [--verbose]` — List loaded plugins\n- `agentscribe plugins validate <path>` — Validate plugin definition\n- `agentscribe plugins show <name>` — Show plugin details\n\n**Scraping:**\n- `agentscribe scrape [--plugin NAME] [--file PATH] [--dry-run] [--json]`\n- Supports: all plugins, single plugin, single file\n- Tracks state (offsets), indexes sessions, auto-commits to git (optional)\n\n**Indexing:**\n- `agentscribe index rebuild [--plugin NAME] [--heap-size MB]` — Drop and rebuild index\n- `agentscribe index stats` — Show index statistics\n- `agentscribe index optimize` — Merge segments for performance\n\n**Search:**\n- `agentscribe search [QUERY] [--error PATTERN] [--code QUERY] [--lang LANG]`\n- Flags: `--solution-only`, `--like SESSION_ID`, `--session SESSION_ID`\n- Filters: `--agent`, `--project`, `--since`, `--before`, `--tag`, `--outcome`, `--type`, `--model`\n- Output: `--max-results`, `--snippet-length`, `--token-budget`, `--offset`\n- Options: `--fuzzy`, `--edit-distance`, `--sort` (relevance|newest|oldest|turns)\n- Output modes: human readable, `--json`, `--hint` (for shell hooks)\n\n**Analytics & Intelligence:**\n- `agentscribe status [--plugin NAME] [--json]` — Show tracked agents and session counts\n- `agentscribe recurring [--since 30d] [--threshold N] [--json]` — Find recurring errors\n- `agentscribe rules <PROJECT_PATH> [--format claude|cursor|aider] [--json]` — Extract rules\n- `agentscribe analytics [--agent NAME] [--project PATH] [--since DATE] [--json]` — Agent metrics\n- `agentscribe digest [--since 7d] [--output FILE] [--json]` — Weekly summary\n- `agentscribe gc [--older-than 30d] [--dry-run] [--json]` — Delete old sessions\n\n**Daemon:**\n- `agentscribe daemon start` — Start background service\n- `agentscribe daemon run` — Run in foreground (systemd mode)\n- `agentscribe daemon stop` — Stop running daemon\n- `agentscribe daemon status [--json]` — Show daemon info (PID, uptime, RSS)\n- `agentscribe daemon logs [-f] [-n 20]` — Tail daemon log\n- `agentscribe daemon install` — Install systemd user service\n- `agentscribe daemon uninstall` — Remove systemd service\n\n**Shell Integration:**\n- `agentscribe shell-hook bash|zsh|fish` — Generate shell integration snippet\n- `agentscribe completions bash|zsh|fish` — Generate shell completions\n\n### **3. config.rs (345 lines) — Configuration**\n- Config structure with sections: general, scrape, index, search, outcome, cost, shell_hook, daemon\n- Default values: debounce=5s, max_session_age_days=0, tantivy_heap=50MB, fuzzy_edit_distance=1\n- Data directory: `~/.agentscribe` (respects XDG_CONFIG_DIR)\n- Bundled plugins: auto-installed on `config init`\n- Git auto-commit: optional config flag\n- Lock timeout for scrape-state.json: configurable (default 30s)\n\n### **4. event.rs (320 lines) — Canonical Event Schema**\n```rust\nstruct Event {\n    ts: DateTime<Utc>,\n    session_id: String,           // format: <agent>/<id>\n    source_agent: String,\n    source_version: Option<String>,\n    project: Option<String>,\n    role: Role,                   // User|Assistant|System|ToolCall|ToolResult\n    content: String,\n    tool: Option<String>,\n    tokens: Option<TokenCounts>,\n    model: Option<String>,\n    file_paths: Vec<String>,      // extracted file references\n    error_fingerprints: Vec<String>, // extracted error patterns\n}\n\n// SessionManifest: metadata for indexing\nstruct SessionManifest {\n    session_id, source_agent, project, started, ended, turns,\n    summary, outcome, tags, files_touched, model\n}\n\n// ScrapeState: tracks file offsets for incremental scraping\nstruct ScrapeState {\n    sources: HashMap<String, SourceFileState> // keyed by abs file path\n}\n```\n\n### **5. scraper/mod.rs (~500 lines) — Scraping Orchestration**\n- **PluginManager:** Loads TOML plugin definitions\n- **Session Detection:** Three strategies:\n  - One-file-per-session (filename or field-based ID)\n  - Timestamp-gap (sessions split by time gaps)\n  - Delimiter-based (sessions marked by regex pattern)\n- **File Discovery:** Glob patterns with excludes\n- **StateManager:** Tracks per-file byte offsets (JSON file with file locking)\n- **IndexManager:** Best-effort indexing (scraping continues if indexing fails)\n- **Scrape Result:** Sessions scraped, events written, files processed, errors\n- Depth tracking for nested scrape calls (scrape_all → scrape_plugin → scrape_file)\n\n### **6. parser/* (4 format parsers)**\n\n**jsonl.rs** — JSONL line-per-event\n- Type filtering (include_types, exclude_types)\n- Role mapping\n- Field extraction with dot notation (e.g., `user.name`)\n- Array indexing support\n\n**markdown.rs** — Aider-style markdown\n- Configurable prefixes (#### for user, > for tool output, etc.)\n- Timestamp pattern matching\n- Timestamp extraction from text\n\n**json_tree.rs** — Hierarchical JSON (OpenCode format)\n- Glob patterns for session/message/part discovery\n- Field path mapping\n- Ordering field for message sequencing\n\n**sqlite.rs** — SQLite (Cursor/Windsurf)\n- Custom SQL query for message extraction\n- Key column filtering (regex session ID extraction)\n- Content path mapping (JSON path within BLOB)\n\nAll parsers share:\n- File path extraction (tool calls + regex)\n- Error fingerprinting\n- Static field injection\n- Project detection (cwd field, git root, parent dir)\n- Model detection (metadata file, event field, static)\n\n### **7. enrichment/* (Intelligence Pipeline Phase 3)**\n\n**outcome.rs** — Outcome Detection\n- Signal scoring system: success/failure/abandoned/unknown\n- Signals: error count, user's final action, solution extraction, tool success rate\n- Config-based thresholds: error_threshold, abandoned_threshold\n\n**summary.rs** — Session Summarization\n- Uses: first user message, outcome, files touched\n- Format: `[outcome] \"Goal\" on files: [list]`\n\n**solution.rs** — Solution Extraction\n- Looks for \"Resolution Window\": assistant response followed by user confirmation\n- Extracts text between those markers\n\n**errors.rs** — Error Fingerprinting\n- Normalizes error messages (removes temps, PIDs, timestamps)\n- Extracts fingerprints: `error_type:normalized_message`\n- Pattern examples: \"FileNotFound:/path/to/file\"\n\n**antipatterns.rs** — Anti-Pattern Detection\n- Detects repeated patterns in failed sessions\n- Examples: incorrect syntax, misconceptions about tools, env issues\n- Tracks which tools/patterns correlate with failures\n\n**code_artifacts.rs** — Code Extraction\n- Finds code blocks (markdown fences) in assistant responses\n- Extracts: language, file path, content, is_final flag\n- Stores as separate indexable documents\n\n**git.rs** — Git Correlation\n- Maps sessions to commits by timestamp overlap\n- Blame functionality: which sessions touched which lines\n- Commit index for fast lookups\n\n### **8. index.rs (~400 lines) — Tantivy Index Schema**\n\nIndex contains 20 fields:\n- **Full-text:** content, summary, solution_summary, code_content (TEXT | STORED)\n- **Faceted:** session_id, source_agent, project, tags, outcome, error_fingerprint, file_paths, git_commits, doc_type, model (STRING | FAST)\n- **Code artifacts:** code_language, code_file_path, code_is_final\n- **Numeric:** timestamp (DATE), turn_count (U64)\n\nDocument building:\n- Session docs: from events + manifest + enrichment\n- Code artifact docs: separate doc_type=\"code_artifact\"\n- Content trimming: max 500KB per session (trim-middle strategy)\n- Tool results capped at 1000 chars\n\n### **9. search.rs (400+ lines) — Full-Text Search**\n\nQuery building from options:\n- **Free text:** BM25 ranking\n- **Error pattern:** regex search on error_fingerprint field\n- **Code search:** match code_content + language filter\n- **Filters:** faceted queries on agent, project, tags, outcome, etc.\n- **Range queries:** timestamp (since/before), turn_count\n- **Fuzzy:** automatic fuzzy term expansion (Levenshtein distance configurable)\n- **\"More like this\":** extracts top terms from one session, searches similar\n\nResults:\n- Score, session_id, source_agent, project, timestamp, turns, outcome\n- Summary and snippet (human-readable context)\n- Token count estimation (chars / 4)\n- Token budget mode: greedy knapsack selection (packing max results within token limit)\n\n### **10. daemon.rs (400+ lines) — Background Service**\n\n- **Startup:** Double-fork to detach from terminal, writes PID file\n- **Watching:** inotify on all plugin source paths\n- **Debouncing:** Coalesces rapid file changes (default 5s)\n- **Rediscovery:** Every 60s re-scan for new directories\n- **State persistence:** daemon_state.json tracks uptime, sessions indexed, last scrape\n- **Logging:** daemon.log file rotation (via tracing-appender)\n- **Systemd integration:** Install/uninstall ~/.config/systemd/user/agentscribe.service\n\n### **11. Other Key Modules**\n\n**tags.rs** (Three-tier tag extraction)\n- Tier 1 (Explicit): Tool names from tool_call, language from code fences\n- Tier 2 (Structural): File extensions → languages, bash commands, error types\n- Tier 3 (Keyword): Word-boundary matching against bundled keyword dictionary\n\n**recurring.rs** (Recurring Problem Detection)\n- Groups error fingerprints across sessions\n- Counts occurrences, affected projects, agents\n- Links to most recent fix session\n- Outputs JSON or human-readable format\n\n**rules.rs** (Auto-Generated Rules)\n- Extracts conventions: tool preferences (pnpm vs npm), patterns\n- Detects user corrections (\"don't use X, use Y\")\n- Competing tools: identifies which tool preference wins by frequency\n- Outputs: CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .aider.conf.yml\n\n**analytics.rs** (Agent Effectiveness)\n- Computes success rates, turn/token efficiency\n- Problem type classification: debug, feature, refactor, investigation, config, docs\n- Specialization: which agent handles which problem types best\n- Trends: weekly/monthly analysis\n- Cost efficiency: estimated cost per session\n\n**digest.rs** (Weekly Activity Summary)\n- Combines: analytics, recurring problems, most-touched files, error patterns\n- Token/cost estimation per model\n- Markdown and JSON output formats\n\n**gc.rs** (Garbage Collection)\n- Deletes sessions older than configured age\n- Removes index entries\n- Dry-run mode for safety\n\n**shell_hook.rs** (Shell Integration)\n- Generates bash/zsh/fish snippets\n- Hooks into shell error handler (on command failure)\n- Runs search in background, displays hint\n\n**mcp.rs** (Model Context Protocol)\n- Unix socket server for MCP clients\n- Exposes search, lookup, and other operations\n- Daemon mode activation flag\n\n---\n\n## **Tests**\n\nComprehensive test coverage across 28 modules:\n- Unit tests in nearly every file (event schema, config, parser edge cases)\n- Integration tests for index pipeline, search, tag extraction\n- SQLite parser and scraper truncation tests\n- Execute_search with token_budget knapsack tests\n- Mock plugin definitions and file system tests\n\n---\n\n## **Current Implementation Status (Phases 1-5 Complete)**\n\n**Phase 1:** ✅ Scraper framework + JSONL/Markdown parsers + event normalization\n**Phase 2:** ✅ Tantivy indexing, full-text search, fuzzy matching, faceted filters\n**Phase 3:** ✅ Enrichment pipeline (outcome, summary, solution, errors, antipatterns, code artifacts, git)\n**Phase 4:** ✅ Daemon with inotify, systemd integration\n**Phase 5:** ✅ SQLite parser, Cursor/Windsurf support\n\n---\n\n## **What's Ready for Phase 2 Build**\n\nYou have a **solid production-ready foundation** to build on. (bundled)\ntokio 1.42             # Async runtime (for daemon)\nnotify 7.0             # File system watcher (inotify)\nchrono 0.4             # Date/time handling\nregex 1.11             # Pattern
