logging\n```\n\n---\n\n## **Key Files & Implementation Details**\n\n### **1. main.rs (33 lines)**\n- Simple entry point that delegates to `cli::run()`\n- Imports all modules, sets up allow(clippy attributes)\n\n### **2. cli.rs (1,702 lines) — CLI Commands**\nComplete implementation of all subcommands:\n\n**Config Management:**\n- `agentscribe config init` — Initialize data directory and install plugins\n- `agentscribe config show` — Display current configuration\n- `agentscribe config set <key> <value>` — Update config value\n- `agentscribe config get <key>` — Get config value\n\n**Plugin Management:**\n- `agentscribe plugins list [--verbose]` — List loaded plugins\n- `agentscribe plugins validate <path>` — Validate plugin definition\n- `agentscribe plugins show <name>` — Show plugin details\n\n**Scraping:**\n- `agentscribe scrape [--plugin NAME] [--file PATH] [--dry-run] [--json]`\n- Supports: all plugins, single plugin, single file\n- Tracks state (offsets), indexes sessions, auto-commits to git (optional)\n\n**Indexing:**\n- `agentscribe index rebuild [--plugin NAME] [--heap-size MB]` — Drop and rebuild index\n- `agentscribe index stats` — Show index statistics\n- `agentscribe index optimize` — Merge segments for performance\n\n**Search:**\n- `agentscribe search [QUERY] [--error PATTERN] [--code QUERY] [--lang LANG]`\n- Flags: `--solution-only`, `--like SESSION_ID`, `--session SESSION_ID`\n- Filters: `--agent`, `--project`, `--since`, `--before`, `--tag`, `--outcome`, `--type`, `--model`\n- Output: `--max-results`, `--snippet-length`, `--token-budget`, `--offset`\n- Options: `--fuzzy`, `--edit-distance`, `--sort` (relevance|newest|oldest|turns)\n- Output modes: human readable, `--json`, `--hint` (for shell hooks)\n\n**Analytics & Intelligence:**\n- `agentscribe status [--plugin NAME] [--json]` — Show tracked agents and session counts\n- `agentscribe recurring [--since 30d] [--threshold N] [--json]` — Find recurring errors\n- `agentscribe rules <PROJECT_PATH> [--format claude|cursor|aider] [--json]` — Extract rules\n- `agentscribe analytics [--agent NAME] [--project PATH] [--since DATE] [--json]` — Agent metrics\n- `agentscribe digest [--since 7d] [--output FILE] [--json]` — Weekly summary\n- `agentscribe gc [--older-than 30d] [--dry-run] [--json]` — Delete old sessions\n\n**Daemon:**\n- `agentscribe daemon start` — Start background service\n- `agentscribe daemon run` — Run in foreground (systemd mode)\n- `agentscribe daemon stop` — Stop running daemon\n- `agentscribe daemon status [--json]` — Show daemon info (PID, uptime, RSS)\n- `agentscribe daemon logs [-f] [-n 20]` — Tail daemon log\n- `agentscribe daemon install` — Install systemd user service\n- `agentscribe daemon uninstall` — Remove systemd service\n\n**Shell Integration:**\n- `agentscribe shell-hook bash|zsh|fish` — Generate shell integration snippet\n- `agentscribe completions bash|zsh|fish` — Generate shell completions\n\n### **3. config.rs (345 lines) — Configuration**\n- Config structure with sections: general, scrape, index, search, outcome, cost, shell_hook, daemon\n- Default values: debounce=5s, max_session_age_days=0, tantivy_heap=50MB, fuzzy_edit_distance=1\n- Data directory: `~/.agentscribe` (respects XDG_CONFIG_DIR)\n- Bundled plugins: auto-installed on `config init`\n- Git auto-commit: optional config flag\n- Lock timeout for scrape-state.json: configurable (default 30s)\n\n### **4. event.rs (320 lines) — Canonical Event Schema**\n```rust\nstruct Event {\n    ts: DateTime<Utc>,\n    session_id: String,           // format: <agent>/<id>\n    source_agent: String,\n    source_version: Option<String>,\n    project: Option<String>,\n    role: Role,                   // User|Assistant|System|ToolCall|ToolResult\n    content: String,\n    tool: Option<String>,\n    tokens: Option<TokenCounts>,\n    model: Option<String>,\n    file_paths: Vec<String>,      // extracted file references\n    error_fingerprints: Vec<String>, // extracted error patterns\n}\n\n// SessionManifest: metadata for indexing\nstruct SessionManifest {\n    session_id, source_agent, project, started, ended, turns,\n    summary, outcome, tags, files_touched, model\n}\n\n// ScrapeState: tracks file offsets for incremental scraping\nstruct ScrapeState {\n    sources: HashMap<String, SourceFileState> // keyed by abs file path\n}\n```\n\n### **5. scraper/mod.rs (~500 lines) — Scraping Orchestration**\n- **PluginManager:** Loads TOML plugin definitions\n- **Session Detection:** Three strategies:\n  - One-file-per-session (filename or field-based ID)\n  - Timestamp-gap (sessions split by time gaps)\n  - Delimiter-based (sessions marked by regex pattern)\n- **File Discovery:** Glob patterns with excludes\n- **StateManager:** Tracks per-file byte offsets (JSON file with file locking)\n- **IndexManager:** Best-effort indexing (scraping continues if indexing fails)\n- **Scrape Result:** Sessions scraped, events written, files processed, errors\n- Depth tracking for nested scrape calls (scrape_all → scrape_plugin → scrape_file)\n\n### **6. parser/* (4 format parsers)**\n\n**jsonl.rs** — JSONL line-per-event\n- Type filtering (include_types, exclude_types)\n- Role mapping\n- Field extraction with dot notation (e.g., `user.name`)\n- Array indexing support\n\n**markdown.rs** — Aider-style markdown\n- Configurable prefixes (#### for user, > for tool output, etc.)\n- Timestamp pattern matching\n- Timestamp extraction from text\n\n**json_tree.rs** — Hierarchical JSON (OpenCode format)\n- Glob patterns for session/message/part discovery\n- Field path mapping\n- Ordering field for message sequencing\n\n**sqlite.rs** — SQLite (Cursor/Windsurf)\n- Custom SQL query for message extraction\n- Key column filtering (regex session ID extraction)\n- Content path mapping (JSON path within BLOB)\n\nAll parsers share:\n- File path extraction (tool calls + regex)\n- Error fingerprinting\n- Static field injection\n- Project detection (cwd field, git root, parent dir)\n- Model detection (metadata file, event field, static)\n\n### **7. enrichment/* (Intelligence Pipeline Phase 3)**\n\n**outcome.rs** — Outcome Detection\n- Signal scoring system: success/failure/abandoned/unknown\n- Signals: error count, user's final action, solution extraction, tool success rate\n- Config-based thresholds: error_threshold, abandoned_threshold\n\n**summary.rs** — Session Summarization\n- Uses: first user message, outcome, files touched\n- Format: `[outcome] \"Goal\" on files: [list]`\n\n**solution.rs** — Solution Extraction\n- Looks for \"Resolution Window\": assistant response followed by user confirmation\n- Extracts text between those markers\n\n**errors.rs** — Error Fingerprinting\n- Normalizes error messages (removes temps, PIDs, timestamps)\n- Extracts fingerprints: `error_type:normalized_message`\n- Pattern examples: \"FileNotFound:/path/to/file\"\n\n**antipatterns.rs** — Anti-Pattern Detection\n- Detects repeated patterns in failed sessions\n- Examples: incorrect syntax, misconceptions about tools, env issues\n- Tracks which tools/patterns correlate with failures\n\n**code_artifacts.rs** — Code Extraction\n- Finds code blocks (markdown fences) in assistant responses\n- Extracts: language, file path, content, is_final flag\n- Stores as separate indexable documents\n\n**git.rs** — Git Correlation\n- Maps sessions to commits by timestamp overlap\n- Blame functionality: which sessions touched which lines\n- Commit index for fast lookups\n\n### **8. index.rs (~400 lines) — Tantivy Index Schema**\n\nIndex contains 20 fields:\n- **Full-text:** content, summary, solution_summary, code_content (TEXT | STORED)\n- **Faceted:** session_id, source_agent, project, tags, outcome, error_fingerprint, file_paths, git_commits, doc_type, model (STRING | FAST)\n- **Code artifacts:** code_language, code_file_path, code_is_final\n- **Numeric:** timestamp (DATE), turn_count (U64)\n\nDocument building:\n- Session docs: from events + manifest + enrichment\n- Code artifact docs: separate doc_type=\"code_artifact\"\n- Content trimming: max 500KB per session (trim-middle strategy)\n- Tool results capped at 1000 chars\n\n### **9. search.rs (400+ lines) — Full-Text Search**\n\nQuery building from options:\n- **Free text:** BM25 ranking\n- **Error pattern:** regex search on error_fingerprint field\n- **Code search:** match code_content + language filter\n- **Filters:** faceted queries on agent, project, tags, outcome, etc.\n- **Range queries:** timestamp (since/before), turn_count\n- **Fuzzy:** automatic fuzzy term expansion (Levenshtein distance configurable)\n- **\"More like this\":** extracts top terms from one session, searches similar\n\nResults:\n- Score, session_id, source_agent, project, timestamp, turns, outcome\n- Summary and snippet (human-readable context)\n- Token count estimation (chars / 4)\n- Token budget mode: greedy knapsack selection (packing max results within token limit)\n\n### **10. daemon.rs (400+ lines) — Background Service**\n\n- **Startup:** Double-fork to detach from terminal, writes PID file\n- **Watching:** inotify on all plugin source paths\n- **Debouncing:** Coalesces rapid file changes (default 5s)\n- **Rediscovery:** Every 60s re-scan for new directories\n- **State persistence:** daemon_state.json tracks uptime, sessions indexed, last scrape\n- **Logging:** daemon.log file rotation (via tracing-appender)\n- **Systemd integration:** Install/uninstall ~/.config/systemd/user/agentscribe.service\n\n### **11. Other Key Modules**\n\n**tags.rs** (Three-tier tag extraction)\n- Tier 1 (Explicit): Tool names from tool_call, language from code fences\n- Tier 2 (Structural): File extensions → languages, bash commands, error types\n- Tier 3 (Keyword): Word-boundary matching against bundled keyword dictionary\n\n**recurring.rs** (Recurring Problem Detection)\n- Groups error fingerprints across sessions\n- Counts occurrences, affected projects, agents\n- Links to most recent fix session\n- Outputs JSON or human-readable format\n\n**rules.rs** (Auto-Generated Rules)\n- Extracts conventions: tool preferences (pnpm vs npm), patterns\n- Detects user corrections (\"don't use X, use Y\")\n- Competing tools: identifies which tool preference wins by frequency\n- Outputs: CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .aider.conf.yml\n\n**analytics.rs** (Agent Effectiveness)\n- Computes success rates, turn/token efficiency\n- Problem type classification: debug, feature, refactor, investigation, config, docs\n- Specialization: which agent handles which problem types best\n- Trends: weekly/monthly analysis\n- Cost efficiency: estimated cost per session\n\n**digest.rs** (Weekly Activity Summary)\n- Combines: analytics, recurring problems, most-touched files, error patterns\n- Token/cost estimation per model\n- Markdown and JSON output formats\n\n**gc.rs** (Garbage Collection)\n- Deletes sessions older than configured age\n- Removes index entries\n- Dry-run mode for safety\n\n**shell_hook.rs** (Shell Integration)\n- Generates bash/zsh/fish snippets\n- Hooks into shell error handler (on command failure)\n- Runs search in background, displays hint\n\n**mcp.rs** (Model Context Protocol)\n- Unix socket server for MCP clients\n- Exposes search, lookup, and other operations\n- Daemon mode activation flag\n\n---\n\n## **Tests**\n\nComprehensive test coverage across 28 modules:\n- Unit tests in nearly every file (event schema, config, parser edge cases)\n- Integration tests for index pipeline, search, tag extraction\n- SQLite parser and scraper truncation tests\n- Execute_search with token_budget knapsack tests\n- Mock plugin definitions and file system tests\n\n---\n\n## index entries\n    Gc {\n        /// Delete sessions older than this duration (e.g., 30d, 12w, 6mo)\n        /// Default: value from config.toml scrape.max_session_age_days\n        #[arg(long)]\n bool,\n    },\n    /// Generate shell integration snippet for auto-querying on error\n    ShellHook {\n        /// Shell to generate snippet for (bash, zsh, fish)\n        shell: String,\n    },\n    /// Generate an activity digest summary\n    Digest {\n        /// Only include sessions after this timestamp (ISO 8601, or relative like 7d, 30d)\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"7d\")]\n        since: String,\n\n        /// Write output to file instead of stdout\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        output: Option<String>,\n\n        /// JSON structured output\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: bool,\n    },\n    /// Generate shell completion script\n    Completions {\n        /// Shell to generate completions for\n        shell: Shell,\n    },\n}\n\n/// Config subcommands\n#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\nenum ConfigAction {\n    /// Initialize global config and data directory\n    Init {\n        /// Force reinitialization\n        #[arg(long)]\n        force: bool,\n    },\n    /// Show current configuration\n    Show,\n    /// Set a configuration value\n    Set {\n        /// Configuration key (e.g., general.log_level)\n        key: String,\n        /// Configuration value\n        value: String,\n    },\n    /// Get a configuration value\n    Get {\n        /// Configuration key\n        key: String,\n    },\n}\n\n/// Plugins subcommands\n#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\nenum PluginsAction {\n    /// List available plugins\n    List {\n        /// Show detailed information\n        #[arg(long)]\n        verbose: bool,\n    },\n    /// Validate a plugin definition\n    Validate {\n        /// Path to plugin file\n        path: PathBuf,\n    },\n    /// Show plugin details\n    Show {\n        /// Plugin name\n        name: String,\n    },\n}\n\n/// Daemon subcommands\n#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\nenum IndexAction {\n    /// Drop and rebuild the index from session files\n    Rebuild {\n        /// Only re-index sessions from this plugin\n        #[arg(short, long)]\n        plugin: Option<String>,\n\n        /// Tantivy writer heap size in MB\n        #[arg(long, default_value = \"50\")]\n        heap_size: usize,\n    },\n    /// Show index statistics\n    Stats,\n    /// Merge segments for better query performance\n    Optimize,\n}\n\n/// Daemon subcommands\n#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\nenum DaemonAction {\n    /// Start the daemon in the background\n    Start,\n    /// Run the daemon in the foreground (for systemd)\n    Run,\n    /// Stop a running daemon\n    Stop,\n    /// Show daemon status (PID, uptime, RSS, activity)\n    Status {\n        /// JSON output\n        #[arg(long)]\n        json: bool,\n    },\n    /// Tail the daemon log\n    Logs {\n        /// Follow mode (like tail -f)\n        #[arg(short = 'f', long)]\n        follow: bool,\n\n        /// Number of lines to show (default: 20)\n        #[arg(short = 'n', long, default_value = \"20\")]\n        lines: usize,\n    },\n    /// Install systemd user service unit (~/.config/systemd/user/agentscribe.service)\n    Install,\n    /// Remove systemd user service unit\n    Uninstall,\n}\n\n/// Table row for plugin list output\n#[derive(Tabled)]\nstruct PluginRow {\n    name: String,\n    version: String,\n    format: String,\n}\n\n/// Run the CLI\npub fn run() -> Result<()> {\n    let args = Args::parse();\n\n    match args.command {\n        Commands::Config { action } => run_config(action),\n        Commands::Plugins { action } => run_plugins(action),\n        Commands::Scrape {\n            plugin,\n            file,\n            dry_run,\n            output_events,\n            json,\n        } => run_scrape(plugin, file, dry_run, output_events, json),\n        Commands::Status { json, plugin } => run_status(json, plugin),\n        Commands::Index { action } => run_index(action)?,\n        Commands::Search {\n            query,\n            error,\n            code,\n            lang,\n            solution_only,\n            like,\n            session,\n            agent,\n            project,\n            since,\n            before,\n            tag,\n            outcome,\n            r#type,\n            model,\n            fuzzy,\n            edit_distance,\n            max_results,\n            snippet_length,\n            token_budget,\n            offset,\n            sort,\n            hint,\n            json,\n        } => run_search(\n            query, error, code, lang, solution_only, like, session,\n            agent, project, since, before, tag, outcome, r#type, model,\n            fuzzy, edit_distance, max_results, snippet_length, token_budget, offset, sort, hint, json,\n        ),\n        Commands::Recurring { since, threshold, json } => run_recurring(since, threshold, json),\n        Commands::Daemon { action } => run_daemon(action),\n        Commands::Rules { project_path, format, json } => run_rules(project_path, format, json),\n        Commands::Analytics { agent, project, since, json } => run_analytics(agent, project, since, json),\n        Commands::Gc { older_than, dry_run, json } => run_gc(older_than, dry_run, json),\n        Commands::ShellHook { shell } => run_shell_hook(&shell),\n        Commands::Digest { since, output, json } => run_digest(since, output, json),\n        Commands::Completions { shell } => {\n            let mut cmd = Args::command();\n            generate(shell, &mut cmd, \"agentscribe\", &mut io::stdout());\n            Ok(())\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Run daemon commands\nfn run_daemon(action: DaemonAction) -> Result<()> {\n    // install/uninstall don't need the data directory to exist\n    match action {\n        DaemonAction::Install => return crate::daemon::install_service(),\n        DaemonAction::Uninstall => return crate::daemon::uninstall_service(),\n        _ => {}\n    }\n\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    // Ensure data directory exists for all other daemon commands\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n        std::process::exit(1);\n    }\n\n    match action {\n        DaemonAction::Start => {\n            crate::daemon::start(&data_dir)?;\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        DaemonAction::Run => {\n            crate::daemon::run(&data_dir)\n        }\n        DaemonAction::Stop => {\n            crate::daemon::stop(&data_dir)\n        }\n        DaemonAction::Status { json } => {\n            let info = crate::daemon::status(&data_dir)?;\n            if json {\n                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&info).unwrap());\n            } else {\n                print_daemon_status(&info);\n            }\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        DaemonAction::Logs { follow, lines } => {\n            crate::daemon::logs(&data_dir, follow, lines)\n        }\n        // Already handled above\n        DaemonAction::Install | DaemonAction::Uninstall => unreachable!(),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Format daemon status for human-readable output\nfn print_daemon_status(info: &crate::daemon::DaemonInfo) {\n    if !info.running {\n        println!(\"Daemon: stopped\");\n        return;\n    }\n\n    println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n\n    if let Some(pid) = info.pid {\n        println!(\"  PID: {}\", pid);\n    }\n\n    if let Some(secs) = info.uptime_secs {\n        println!(\"  Uptime: {}\", crate::daemon::format_duration(secs));\n    }\n\n    if let Some(rss) = info.rss_bytes {\n        println!(\"  RSS: {}\", crate::daemon::format_bytes(rss));\n    }\n\n    if let Some(peak) = info.peak_rss_bytes {\n        println!(\"  Peak RSS: {}\", crate::daemon::format_bytes(peak));\n    }\n\n    if let Some(sessions) = info.sessions_indexed {\n        println!(\"  Sessions indexed: {}\", sessions);\n    }\n\n    if let Some(ts) = info.last_scrape {\n        println!(\"  Last scrape: {}\", ts.to_rfc3339());\n    }\n\n    if let Some(ts) = info.started_at {\n        println!(\"  Started at: {}\", ts.to_rfc3339());\n    }\n}\n\n/// Run config commands\nfn run_config(action: ConfigAction) -> Result<()> {\n    match action {\n        ConfigAction::Init { force } => {\n            let data_dir = config::init(force)?;\n            println!(\"Initialized AgentScribe data directory: {}\", data_dir.display());\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        ConfigAction::Show => {\n            let config = load_config()?;\n            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n            println!(\"Data directory: {}\", data_dir.display());\n            println!(\"Log level: {}\", config.general.log_level);\n            println!(\"\\nScraping:\");\n            println!(\"  Debounce: {}s\", config.scrape.debounce_seconds);\n            println!(\"  Max session age: {} days\", config.scrape.max_session_age_days);\n            println!(\"  Git auto-commit: {}\", config.scrape.git_auto_commit);\n            println!(\"\\nSearch:\");\n            println!(\"  Default max results: {}\", config.search.default_max_results);\n            println!(\"  Default snippet length: {}\", config.search.default_snippet_length);\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        ConfigAction::Set { key, value } => {\n            let mut config = load_config()?;\n            // Simple key-path setter (could be enhanced)\n            match key.split('.').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {\n                [\"general\", \"log_level\"] => config.general.log_level = value.clone(),\n                [\"scrape\", \"debounce_seconds\"] => {\n                    config.scrape.debounce_seconds = value.parse().unwrap_or(5);\n                }\n                [\"scrape\", \"max_session_age_days\"] => {\n                    config.scrape.max_session_age_days = value.parse().unwrap_or(0);\n                }\n                [\"scrape\", \"git_auto_commit\"] => {\n                    config.scrape.git_auto_commit = matches!(value.to_lowercase().as_str(), \"true\" | \"1\" | \"yes\");\n                }\n                _ => {\n                    eprintln!(\"Unknown configuration key: {}\", key);\n                    return Ok(());\n                }\n            }\n\n            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n            let config_path = data_dir.join(\"config.toml\");\n            config.save(&config_path)?;\n            println!(\"Set {} = {}\", key, value);\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        ConfigAction::Get { key } => {\n            let config = load_config()?;\n            let value = match key.split('.').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {\n                [\"general\", \"data_dir\"] => config.data_dir()?.display().to_string(),\n                [\"general\", \"log_level\"] => config.general.log_level.clone(),\n                [\"scrape\", \"debounce_seconds\"] => config.scrape.debounce_seconds.to_string(),\n                [\"scrape\", \"max_session_age_days\"] => config.scrape.max_session_age_days.to_string(),\n                [\"scrape\", \"git_auto_commit\"] => config.scrape.git_auto_commit.to_string(),\n                _ => {\n                    eprintln!(\"Unknown configuration key: {}\", key);\n                    return Ok(());\n                }\n            };\n            println!(\"{}\", value);\n            Ok(())\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Run plugins commands\nfn run_plugins(action: PluginsAction) -> Result<()> {\n    match action {\n        PluginsAction::List { verbose } => {\n            let config = load_config()?;\n            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n            let plugin_dir = data_dir.join(\"plugins\");\n\n            let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir)?;\n            scraper.load_plugins()?;\n\n            let mut rows = Vec::new();\n\n            for (name, plugin) in scraper.plugin_manager().all() {\n                rows.push(PluginRow {\n                    name: name.clone(),\n                    version: plugin.plugin.version.clone(),\n                    format: plugin.source.format.as_str().to_string(),\n                });\n\n                if verbose {\n                    println!(\"Plugin: {}\", name);\n                    println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n                    println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n                    println!(\"  Paths:\");\n                    for path in &plugin.source.paths {\n                        println!(\"    - {}\", path);\n                    }\n                    println!();\n                }\n            }\n\n            if !verbose {\n                if rows.is_empty() {\n                    println!(\"No plugins found in {}\", plugin_dir.display());\n                } else {\n                    println!(\"{}\", Table::new(rows));\n                }\n            }\n\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        PluginsAction::Validate { path } => {\n            let plugin = validate_plugin_file(&path)?;\n            println!(\"Plugin '{}' is valid!\", plugin.plugin.name);\n            println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n            println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n            Ok(())\n        }\n        PluginsAction::Show { name } => {\n            let config = load_config()?;\n            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n            let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir)?;\n            scraper.load_plugins()?;\n\n            if let Some(plugin) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&name) {\n                println!(\"Plugin: {}\", plugin.plugin.name);\n                println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n                println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n                println!(\"\\n  Source paths:\");\n                for path in &plugin.source.paths {\n                    println!(\"    - {}\", path);\n                }\n                if !plugin.source.exclude.is_empty() {\n                    println!(\"  Excludes:\");\n                    for pattern in &plugin.source.exclude {\n                        println!(\"    - {}\", pattern);\n                    }\n                }\n                println!(\"\\n  Session detection:\");\n                match &plugin.source.session_detection {\n                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::OneFilePerSession { .. } => {\n                        println!(\"    Method: one-file-per-session\");\n                    }\n                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::TimestampGap { gap_threshold } => {\n                        println!(\"    Method: timestamp-gap ({})\", gap_threshold);\n                    }\n                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::Delimiter { delimiter_pattern } => {\n                        println!(\"    Method: delimiter ({})\", delimiter_pattern);\n                    }\n                }\n            } else {\n                eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", name);\n                std::process::exit(1);\n            }\n\n            Ok(())\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Run scrape command\nfn run_scrape(\n    plugin: Option<String>,\n    file: Option<PathBuf>,\n    dry_run: bool,\n    _output_events: bool,\n    _json: bool,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    // Initialize if needed\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        println!(\"Data directory not found. Initializing...\");\n        config::init(false)?;\n    }\n\n    let mut scraper = Scraper::new_with_lock_timeout(data_dir.clone(), config.scrape.lock_timeout_seconds)?;\n    scraper.load_plugins()?;\n\n    if let Some(file_path) = file {\n        // Scrape single file\n        println!(\"Scraping file: {}\", file_path.display());\n\n        // Determine plugin from file or use specified\n        let plugin_name = plugin.clone().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            // Try to detect from file location\n            let path_str = file_path.display().to_string();\n            if path_str.contains(\".claude\") {\n                \"claude-code\".to_string()\n            } else if path_str.contains(\"aider\") {\n                \"aider\".to_string()\n            } else if path_str.contains(\"codex\") {\n                \"codex\".to_string()\n            } else if path_str.contains(\"opencode\") {\n                \"opencode\".to_string()\n            } else {\n                eprintln!(\"Cannot auto-detect plugin. Use --plugin to specify.\");\n                std::process::exit(1);\n            }\n        });\n\n        if let Some(p) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&plugin_name).cloned() {\n            if dry_run {\n                println!(\"Dry run - would scrape with plugin: {}\", plugin_name);\n                println!(\"  File: {}\", file_path.display());\n                println!(\"  Format: {}\", p.source.format.as_str());\n                // For dry run, just show we'd process it\n                println!(\"  Would detect sessions and parse events...\");\n            } else {\n                let result = scraper.scrape_file(&file_path, &p)?;\n                scraper.state_manager().save()?;\n                println!(\"Scraped {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n                if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n                    println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n                }\n                if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n                    eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n                }\n                if config.scrape.git_auto_commit {\n                    if git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n                        println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", plugin_name);\n            std::process::exit(1);\n        }\n    } else if let Some(plugin_name) = plugin {\n        // Scrape specific plugin\n        println!(\"Scraping plugin: {}\", plugin_name);\n\n        if let Some(p) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&plugin_name).cloned() {\n            if dry_run {\n                println!(\"Dry run - would discover and scrape files:\");\n                let files = scraper.discover_files(&p)?;\n                for file in files {\n                    println!(\"  - {}\", file.display());\n                }\n            } else {\n                let result = scraper.scrape_plugin(&p)?;\n                scraper.state_manager().save()?;\n                println!(\n                    \"Scraped {} session(s) from {} file(s)\",\n                    result.sessions_scraped,\n                    result.files_processed\n                );\n                if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n                    println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n                }\n                if result.files_skipped > 0 {\n                    println!(\"  ({} files unchanged, skipped)\", result.files_skipped);\n                }\n                if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n                    eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n                    for error in &result.errors[..result.errors.len().min(5)] {\n                        eprintln!(\"  - {}: {}\", error.file, error.message);\n                    }\n                    if result.errors.len() > 5 {\n                        eprintln!(\"  ... and {} more\", result.errors.len() - 5);\n                    }\n                }\n                if config.scrape.git_auto_commit {\n                    if git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n                        println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", plugin_name);\n            std::process::exit(1);\n        }\n    } else {\n        // Scrape all plugins\n        println!(\"Scraping all plugins...\");\n\n        if dry_run {\n            for plugin_name in scraper.plugin_manager().names() {\n                println!(\"  - {}\", plugin_name);\n            }\n        } else {\n            let result = scraper.scrape_all()?;\n            println!(\n                \"Scraped {} session(s) total\",\n                result.sessions_scraped\n            );\n            if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n                println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n            }\n            if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n                eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n            }\n            if config.scrape.git_auto_commit {\n                if git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n                    println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s) ({})\", result.sessions_scraped, result.agent_types.join(\", \"));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Run search command\n#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]\nfn run_search(\n    query: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<String>,\n    code: Option<String>,\n    lang: Option<String>,\n    solution_only: bool,\n    like: Option<String>,\n    session: Option<String>,\n    agent: Vec<String>,\n    project: Option<String>,\n    since: Option<String>,\n    before: Option<String>,\n    tag: Vec<String>,\n    outcome: Option<String>,\n    doc_type_filter: Option<String>,\n    model: Option<String>,\n    fuzzy: bool,\n    edit_distance: Option<u8>,\n    max_results: usize,\n    snippet_length: usize,\n    token_budget: Option<usize>,\n    offset: usize,\n    sort: String,\n    hint: bool,\n    json: bool,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    let sort_order = match sort.as_str() {\n        \"newest\" => SortOrder::Newest,\n        \"oldest\" => SortOrder::Oldest,\n        \"turns\" => SortOrder::Turns,\n        _ => SortOrder::Relevance,\n    };\n\n    let since_dt = since\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(search::parse_datetime)\n        .transpose()?;\n\n    let before_dt = before\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(search::parse_datetime)\n        .transpose()?;\n\n    let opts = SearchOptions {\n        query,\n        error_pattern: error,\n        code_query: code,\n        code_lang: lang,\n        solution_only,\n        like_session: like,\n        session_id: session,\n        agent,\n        project,\n        since: since_dt,\n        before: before_dt,\n        tag,\n        outcome,\n        doc_type_filter,\n        model,\n        file_path: None,\n        fuzzy,\n        fuzzy_distance: edit_distance.unwrap_or(config.search.fuzzy_edit_distance),\n        max_results,\n        snippet_length,\n        token_budget,\n        offset,\n        sort: sort_order,\n    };\n\n    let output = search::execute_search(&data_dir, &opts)?;\n\n    if hint {\n        // Print a single-line hint for shell hook integration\n        if let Some(result) = output.results.first() {\n            let text = result\n                .snippet\n                .as_deref()\n                .or(result.summary.as_deref())\n                .unwrap_or(\"\")\n                .trim();\n            let one_line: String = text.split_whitespace().collect::<Vec<_>>().join(\" \");\n            if !one_line.is_empty() {\n                if one_line.len() > 120 {\n                    println!(\"{}...\", &one_line[..117]);\n                } else {\n                    println!(\"{}\", one_line);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    } else if json {\n        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n    } else {\n        println!(\"{}\", search::format_human(&output, snippet_length));\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Run shell-hook command\nfn run_shell_hook(shell: &str) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config().unwrap_or_default();\n    let snippet = crate::shell_hook::generate_hook(shell, &config.shell_hook)?;\n    print!(\"{}\", snippet);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Run index subcommands\nfn run_index(action: IndexAction) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n        std::process::exit(1);\n    }\n\n    match action {\n        IndexAction::Rebuild { plugin, heap_size } => {\n            run_index_rebuild(&data_dir, plugin.as_deref(), heap_size)\n        }\n        IndexAction::Stats => run_index_stats(&data_dir),\n        IndexAction::Optimize => run_index_optimize(&data_dir),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Run index rebuild: drop existing index and rebuild from session files.\nfn run_index_rebuild(data_dir: &std::path::Path, plugin_filter: Option<&str>, _heap_size: usize) -> Result<()> {\n    let sessions_dir = data_dir.join(\"sessions\");\n\n    if !sessions_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"No sessions directory found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n        std::process::exit(2);\n    }\n\n    // Drop existing index\n    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n    if index_path.exists() {\n        println!(\"Dropping existing index...\");\n        std::fs::remove_dir_all(&index_path)?;\n    }\n\n    let mut manager = IndexManager::open(data_dir)?;\n    manager.begin_write()?;\n\n    let mut total_docs = 0usize;\n    let mut total_errors = 0usize;\n\n    // Walk session directories\n    let entries = match std::fs::read_dir(&sessions_dir) {\n        Ok(e) => e,\n        Err(_) => {\n            eprintln!(\"Cannot read sessions directory.\");\n            std::process::exit(2);\n        }\n    };\n\n    for agent_entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n        let agent_path = agent_entry.path();\n        if !agent_path.is_dir() {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        let agent_name = match agent_path.file_name().and_then(|n| n.to_str()) {\n            Some(n) => n.to_string(),\n            None => continue,\n        };\n\n        // Apply plugin filter\n        if let Some(filter) = plugin_filter {\n            if agent_name != filter {\n                continue;\n            }\n        }\n\n        let session_files = match std::fs::read_dir(&agent_path) {\n            Ok(e) => e,\n            Err(_) => continue,\n        };\n\n        for session_entry in session_files.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n            let session_path = session_entry.path();\n            if session_path.extension().and_then(|e| e.to_str()) != Some(\"jsonl\") {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            let session_id = format!(\"{}/{}\", agent_name,\n                session_path.file_stem().and_then(|s| s.to_str()).unwrap_or(\"unknown\"));\n\n            // Read events from the normalized session file\n            let file = match std::fs::File::open(&session_path) {\n                Ok(f) => f,\n                Err(e) => {\n                    eprintln!(\"Error reading {}: {}\", session_path.display(), e);\n                    total_errors += 1;\n                    continue;\n                }\n            };\n\n            use std::io::BufRead;\n            let reader = std::io::BufReader::new(file);\n            let mut events = Vec::new();\n\n            for line in reader.lines() {\n                match line {\n                    Ok(l) => {\n                        if let Ok(event) = crate::event::Event::from_jsonl(&l) {\n                            events.push(event);\n                        }\n                    }\n                    Err(_) => {\n                        total_errors += 1;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            if events.is_empty() {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Build manifest from events\n            let first = &events[0];\n            let manifest = crate::index::build_manifest_from_events(\n                &events,\n                &session_id,\n                &agent_name,\n                first.project.as_deref(),\n                first.model.as_deref(),\n            );\n\n            match manager.index_session(&events, &manifest) {\n                Ok(_) => total_docs += 1,\n                Err(e) => {\n                    eprintln!(\"Error indexing {}: {}\", session_id, e);\n                    total_errors += 1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    manager.finish()?;\n\n    println!(\"Rebuilt index from {} session files ({} errors)\", total_docs, total_errors);\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Show index statistics.\nfn run_index_stats(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n\n    if !index_path.exists() {\n        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n        return Ok(());\n    }\n\n    let index = match search::open_index(data_dir) {\n        Ok(i) => i,\n        Err(e) => {\n            eprintln!(\"Error opening index: {}\", e);\n            std::process::exit(1);\n        }\n    };\n\n    let reader = index.reader().map_err(|e| {\n        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to create reader: {}\", e))\n    })?;\n    let searcher = reader.searcher();\n\n    let num_docs = searcher.num_docs();\n    let segments = index.searchable_segment_metas()?;\n    let num_segments = segments.len();\n    let schema = index.schema();\n    let fields: Vec<String> = schema.fields().map(|(field, _)| {\n        schema.get_field_name(field).to_string()\n    }).collect();\n\n    let size_bytes = dir_size(&index_path);\n\n    println!(\"Tantivy index at {}\", index_path.display());\n    println!(\"  Documents:    {}\", num_docs);\n    println!(\"  Segments:     {}\", num_segments);\n    println!(\"  Size on disk: {}\", format_bytes(size_bytes));\n    println!(\"  Fields:       {}\", fields.join(\", \"));\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Optimize the index by merging segments.\nfn run_index_optimize(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n\n    if !index_path.exists() {\n        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n        return Ok(());\n    }\n\n    let pre_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n\n    let index = search::open_index(data_dir)?;\n    let segments = index.searchable_segment_metas()?;\n    let num_segments = segments.len();\n\n    println!(\"Merging {} segments...\", num_segments);\n\n    let writer = index.writer(50_000_000).map_err(|e| {\n        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to open writer: {}\", e))\n    })?;\n\n    // Block until merge completes\n    let merge_future = writer.merge_segments();\n    merge_future.wait().map_err(|e| {\n        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to merge segments: {}\", e))\n    })?;\n\n    // Trigger GC to clean old segment files\n    drop(writer);\n    let gc_writer = index.writer(50_000_000).map_err(|e| {\n        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to open writer for GC: {}\", e))\n    })?;\n    gc_writer.garbage_collect_files().wait().map_err(|e| {\n        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to garbage collect: {}\", e))\n    })?;\n\n    let post_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n\n    println!(\"Merged {} segments ({} → {})\", num_segments, format_bytes(pre_size), format_bytes(post_size));\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Run status command\nfn run_status(json: bool, plugin_filter: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n    let data_dir_str = data_dir.display().to_string();\n\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n        std::process::exit(1);\n    }\n\n    let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir.clone())?;\n    scraper.load_plugins()?;\n\n    // Determine which plugins to show\n    let plugin_names: Vec<String> = if let Some(ref filter) = plugin_filter {\n        if scraper.plugin_manager().get(filter).is_some() {\n            vec![filter.clone()]\n        } else {\n            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", filter);\n            std::process::exit(1);\n        }\n    } else {\n        scraper.plugin_manager().names()\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(String::from)\n            .collect()\n    };\n\n    // Gather scrape state\n    let scrape_state = scraper.state_manager().get_all();\n\n    // Collect per-plugin status\n    let mut plugin_statuses = Vec::new();\n    let mut total_events: u64 = 0;\n    let mut total_sources: usize = 0;\n    let mut total_bytes: u64 = 0;\n\n    for plugin_name in &plugin_names {\n        let sessions = scraper.list_sessions(plugin_name)?;\n\n        // Count events across all sessions for this plugin\n        let mut plugin_events: u64 = 0;\n        for session_id in &sessions {\n            if let Ok(events) = scraper.read_session(session_id) {\n                plugin_events += events.len() as u64;\n            }\n        }\n        total_events += plugin_events;\n\n        // Get source paths and truncation_limit from plugin config\n        let (source_paths, truncation_limit) = scraper.plugin_manager()\n            .get(plugin_name)\n            .map(|p| (p.source.paths.clone(), p.source.truncation_limit))\n            .unwrap_or_default();\n\n        // Find last scraped time and byte totals from scrape state for this plugin\n        let plugin_files: Vec<_> = scrape_state.sources.iter()\n            .filter(|(_, s)| s.plugin == *plugin_name)\n            .collect();\n\n        let last_scraped = plugin_files.iter()\n            .filter_map(|(_, s)| Some(s.last_scraped))\n            .max();\n\n        let mut plugin_bytes: u64 = 0;\n        for (_, file_state) in &plugin_files {\n            plugin_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n            total_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n        }\n        total_sources += plugin_files.len();\n\n        plugin_statuses.push(PluginStatus {\n            name: plugin_name.to_string(),\n            sessions: sessions.len(),\n            events: plugin_events,\n            last_scraped,\n            source_paths,\n            source_files: plugin_files.len(),\n            bytes: plugin_bytes,\n            truncation_limit,\n        });\n    }\n\n    // Daemon state (Phase 4 - check PID file if it exists)\n    let daemon_status = get_daemon_status(&data_dir);\n\n    // Disk usage of data directory\n    let dir_bytes = dir_size(&data_dir);\n\n    // Index stats (Phase 2 - check if index directory exists)\n    let index_dir = data_dir.join(\"index\");\n    let index_stats = get_index_stats(&index_dir);\n\n    if json {\n        use serde_json::json;\n        let mut plugins_json = Vec::new();\n        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n            let mut p = json!({\n                \"name\": ps.name,\n                \"sessions\": ps.sessions,\n                \"events\": ps.events,\n                \"source_files\": ps.source_files,\n                \"bytes\": ps.bytes,\n                \"source_paths\": ps.source_paths,\n            });\n            if let Some(ts) = ps.last_scraped {\n                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(ts.to_rfc3339());\n            } else {\n                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(null);\n            }\n            plugins_json.push(p);\n        }\n\n        let mut status = json!({\n            \"version\": env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"),\n            \"data_dir\": data_dir_str,\n            \"data_dir_bytes\": dir_bytes,\n            \"plugins\": plugins_json,\n            \"scrape_state\": {\n                \"tracked_sources\": total_sources,\n                \"total_bytes\": total_bytes,\n            },\n            \"daemon\": {\n                \"running\": daemon_status.running,\n                \"pid\": daemon_status.pid,\n            },\n            \"index\": {\n                \"exists\": index_stats.exists,\n                \"documents\": index_stats.documents,\n                \"size_bytes\": index_stats.size_bytes,\n            },\n        });\n\n        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&status).unwrap());\n    } else {\n        println!(\"AgentScribe v{}\", env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"));\n        println!(\"Data dir: {} ({})\", data_dir_str, format_bytes(dir_bytes));\n\n        // Daemon\n        if daemon_status.running {\n            if let Some(pid) = daemon_status.pid {\n                println!(\"Daemon: running (PID {})\", pid);\n            } else {\n                println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n            }\n        } else {\n            println!(\"Daemon: stopped\");\n        }\n\n        // Plugins\n        println!(\"\\nPlugins:\");\n        if plugin_statuses.is_empty() {\n            println!(\"  (none)\");\n        }\n        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n            let last = match ps.last_scraped {\n                Some(ts) => format_ago(ts),\n                None => \"never scraped\".to_string(),\n            };\n            println!(\n                \"  {:<14} {:>4} sessions  {:>6} events  {}  ({} source files, {})\",\n                ps.name, ps.sessions, ps.events, last, ps.source_files, format_bytes(ps.bytes)\n            );\n        }\n\n        // Windsurf truncation warning\n        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n            if ps.name == \"windsurf\" && ps.truncation_limit.is_some() {\n                println!(\"\\n  WARNING: Windsurf retains at most {} conversations.\",\n                         ps.truncation_limit.unwrap());\n                println!(\"  Old conversations are silently overwritten. Run 'agentscribe scrape'\");\n                println!(\"  frequently (e.g., via 'agentscribe daemon start') to avoid data loss.\");\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Index\n        if index_stats.exists {\n            println!(\n                \"\\nIndex: {} documents, {} on disk\",\n                index_stats.documents,\n                format_bytes(index_stats.size_bytes)\n            );\n        } else {\n            println!(\"\\nIndex: not built (run 'agentscribe index build')\");\n        }\n\n        // Scrape state\n        println!(\n            \"\\nScrape state: tracking offsets for {} source paths ({} total)\",\n            total_sources,\n            format_bytes(total_bytes)\n        );\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Per-plugin status data\nstruct PluginStatus {\n    name: String,\n    sessions: usize,\n    events: u64,\n    last_scraped: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>,\n    source_paths: Vec<String>,\n    source_files: usize,\n    bytes: u64,\n    truncation_limit: Option<u32>,\n}\n\n/// Daemon status info\nstruct DaemonStatus {\n    running: bool,\n    pid: Option<u32>,\n}\n\n/// Index stats\nstruct IndexStats {\n    exists: bool,\n    documents: usize,\n    size_bytes: u64,\n}\n\n/// Check daemon status by reading PID file\nfn get_daemon_status(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> DaemonStatus {\n    let pid_file = data_dir.join(\"agentscribe.pid\");\n    if let Ok(content) = std::fs::read_to_string(&pid_file) {\n        if let Ok(pid) = content.trim().parse::<u32>() {\n            // Check if process is actually running\n            unsafe {\n                // kill(pid, 0) checks if process exists without sending a signal\n                if libc::kill(pid as i32, 0) == 0 {\n                    return DaemonStatus {\n                        running: true,\n                        pid: Some(pid),\n                    };\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    DaemonStatus {\n        running: false,\n        pid: None,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Get index stats\nfn get_index_stats(index_dir: &std::path::Path) -> IndexStats {\n    let tantivy_dir = index_dir.join(\"tantivy\");\n    if !tantivy_dir.exists() {\n        return IndexStats {\n            exists: false,\n            documents: 0,\n            size_bytes: 0,\n        };\n    }\n\n    let size_bytes = dir_size(&tantivy_dir);\n\n    // Read actual document count from Tantivy index\n    let documents = match tantivy::Index::open_in_dir(&tantivy_dir) {\n        Ok(index) => {\n            match index.reader() {\n                Ok(reader) => reader.searcher().num_docs() as usize,\n                Err(_) => 0,\n            }\n        }\n        Err(_) => 0,\n    };\n\n    IndexStats {\n        exists: documents > 0 || size_bytes > 0,\n        documents,\n        size_bytes,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Format bytes as human-readable size\nfn format_bytes(bytes: u64) -> String {\n    const KB: u64 = 1024;\n    const MB: u64 = 1024 * KB;\n    const GB: u64 = 1024 * MB;\n\n    if bytes >= GB {\n        format!(\"{:.1} GB\", bytes as f64 / GB as f64)\n    } else if bytes >= MB {\n        format!(\"{:.1} MB\", bytes as f64 / MB as f64)\n    } else if bytes >= KB {\n        format!(\"{:.1} KB\", bytes as f64 / KB as f64)\n    } else {\n        format!(\"{} B\", bytes)\n    }\n}\n\n/// Format a timestamp as relative time ago\nfn format_ago(ts: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>) -> String {\n    let now = chrono::Utc::now();\n    let duration = now.signed_duration_since(ts);\n\n    if duration.num_days() > 0 {\n        format!(\"{}d ago\", duration.num_days())\n    } else if duration.num_hours() > 0 {\n        format!(\"{}h ago\", duration.num_hours())\n    } else if duration.num_minutes() > 0 {\n        format!(\"{}m ago\", duration.num_minutes())\n    } else {\n        \"just now\".to_string()\n    }\n}\n\n/// Recursively compute directory size in bytes\nfn dir_size(path: &std::path::Path) -> u64 {\n    if !path.exists() {\n        return 0;\n    }\n\n    if path.is_file() {\n        return path.metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0);\n    }\n\n    let mut total: u64 = 0;\n    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n            let p = entry.path();\n            if p.is_dir() {\n                total += dir_size(&p);\n            } else if let Ok(m) = p.metadata() {\n                total += m.len();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    total\n}\n\n/// Count files with a given extension recursively\nfn count_files_recursive(path: &std::path::Path, ext: &str) -> usize {\n    if !path.is_dir() {\n        return 0;\n    }\n\n    let mut count = 0;\n    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n            let p = entry.path();\n            if p.is_dir() {\n                count += count_files_recursive(&p, ext);\n            } else if p.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()) == Some(ext) {\n                count += 1;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    count\n}\n\n/// Load configuration from default location\nfn load_config() -> Result<Config> {\n    let config_path = config::config_path();\n    if let Some(path) = config_path {\n        Config::load(&path)\n    } else {\n        Ok(Config::default())\n    }\n}\n\n/// Run recurring problem detection\nfn run_recurring(since: Option<String>, threshold: usize, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n        std::process::exit(1);\n    }\n\n    let since_dt = match since {\n        Some(ref s) => search::parse_datetime(s)?,\n        None => chrono::Utc::now() - chrono::Duration::days(30),\n    };\n\n    let opts = crate::recurring::RecurringOptions {\n        since: since_dt,\n        threshold,\n    };\n\n    let output = crate::recurring::detect_recurring(&data_dir, &opts)?;\n\n    if json {\n        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n    } else {\n        print!(\"{}\", crate::recurring::format_human(&output));\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Run rules extraction command\nfn run_rules(project_path: PathBuf, format: String, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n        std::process::exit(1);\n    }\n\n    let output_format = match crate::rules::OutputFormat::from_str(&format) {\n        Some(f) => f,\n        None => {\n            eprintln!(\"Unknown format: {}. Use claude, cursor, or aider.\", format);\n            std::process::exit(1);\n        }\n    };\n\n    let output = crate::rules::extract_rules(&data_dir, &project_path)?;\n\n    if json {\n        use serde_json::json;\n        let rules_json: Vec<serde_json::Value> = output.rules.iter().map(|r| {\n            match r {\n                crate::rules::Rule::Correction(s) => json!({\"type\": \"correction\", \"rule\": s}),\n                crate::rules::Rule::Convention(s) => json!({\"type\": \"convention\", \"rule\": s}),\n                crate::rules::Rule::Context(s) => json!({\"type\": \"context\", \"rule\": s}),\n                crate::rules::Rule::Warning(s) => json!({\"type\": \"warning\", \"rule\": s}),\n            }\n        }).collect();\n\n        let result = json!({\n            \"project_path\": output.project_path.display().to_string(),\n            \"sessions_analyzed\": output.sessions_analyzed,\n            \"rules\": rules_json,\n        });\n        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&result).unwrap());\n    } else {\n        if output.rules.is_empty() {\n            println!(\"{}\", crate::rules::format_human(&output));\n            return Ok(());\n        }\n\n        let path = crate::rules::write_rules(&output, output_format, &project_path)?;\n        println!(\n            \"Wrote {} rules to {} ({} sessions analyzed)\",\n            output.rules.len(),\n            path.display(),\n            output.sessions_analyzed,\n        );\n    }\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Run analytics command\nfn run_analytics(\n    agent: Option<String>,\n    project: Option<String>,\n    since: Option<String>,\n    json: bool,\n) -> Result<()> {\n    let config = load_config()?;\n    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n\n    if !data_dir.exists() {\n        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n        std::process::exit(1);\n    }\n\n    // Determine max age: CLI arg > config > error\n    let max_age = if let Some(ref duration_str) = older_than {\n        crate::gc::parse_duration(duration_str)?\n    } else if config.scrape.max_session_age_days > 0 {\n        chrono::Duration::days(config.scrape.max_session_age_days as i64)\n    } else {\n        eprintln!(\"No max session age configured. Debug)]\nenum Commands {\n    /// Manage global config and data directory\n    Config {\n        #[command(subcommand)]\n        action: ConfigAction,\n    },\n    /// Manage scraper plugin
